subject: You’ve got mail!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
The best kind of mail

|
---
Friends,

I am beyond grateful for all of the support I've gotten across Iowa and the entire country.

It means the world to Barbara and me knowing we have so many supporters at the grassroots at our side. Your prayers and support kept us going on the road to victory in 2022.

I love Iowa -- and what makes our home state so special is the people.

Just a reminder, if you would like to support Republicans **[feel free to contribute anything you can.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=b906ab120cad41488d86512787428b22&_e=_Npd54JVDECsjg0hYfjSyU6ucuc55c7ghQ1BfGaNv0vY_Ab0sC_GEFxofSaWgZFDNkIwfLCzxmSgIOQv0Z6dXAouMEJyDugbGglqhfHB9q6JqjSiksz4rxETi3WkOUaznd7hfORjMzAYSPzlIyJulMdRJDGhF6lht5tK69IqEOoF9EdARJOi1cRWr19K2GyGQeTJwY8hhaMxlY4vXOlmm1PmkmWMsEOJP-j8kIYpAwVl9LD5AJJy5O3KUScPlIXswHNAGoncKuvq0g8urTugwoSeGkgfAE11eiV6HCEkZqCImiirTiWNN6_IuRUNGw1u1SZ7C1j2D7VZv753mpwa1mm6k0Gjs3DBbC_VZ0D8CZm0DwhA7sy0ebJuoQxN2WlZiSAc5TybBRPMHFia0SODZtTaG-fpxQx8syIi9_puSZUxGq_9Cb-mXpdqFQ38-KuUwO1KWV1J6fkZBHNnatRmPQ%3D%3D)** I am truly appreciative of you and your support!

Keep in touch,
Chuck

_Sent from my iPhone._

| Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

**FLASHBACK**

**The Night Before The Botched Election**

We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned.

"We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?"

-Kari lake

We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls.

**It was worse than we could have ever imagined.**

Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it’s only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself.

We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game — and we need to be ready for the long haul.

name: Your Supporter Record (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Your December supporter record
body:
To help us catch up to our end-of-year goal, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. | | |
---
| | Hi our end-of-year fundraising deadline is quickly approaching – and **just today, we noticed that we are falling dangerously short of our final fundraising goal of the year.** **This time last month, our team had brought in 9,704 gifts – and this month we’ve only brought in 3,073. Can you take a look at what we have on record for you?** | **Name** | **Email** | **Status** | **Suggested Gift**
---|---|---|---
Janet M. | – | Contributed | N/A
**On File** | **[_dpwillis67@gmail.com_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHbAwXi1YWzwiVR22BOcczmU02rJ3rNjd414zPHBbx9efzte6n9ux93lqPqig9A1Cf0Vy8-_gzwaglTGqXrfcmqMDBHwGKQE34Nw71StRDmEo1qm6GlQ7xgb11kUEkvyz5VXF9sQoWOBLDyyu3C8bsnhEENyzcaykDQfmVXIr0XhvFmli5F6PsXbmBxp-KwimxTFmvm_wlwCdJL2T3Ukh2nuqTlO9KgcGL8hvLXKJjVJPkJZGfoXUE_rJ7GL2gtRBHY68DOl9Ltaea_Sp8BSvzX9ZC1pjPXsHSS5ue95BgM1fIlFrNCJrxyrfMqovu7_qwtOyekoQdEj2pJGcrkYQzV9vTnJPvFH8AYaabRevdNnInNXwIgKjU-EbMd11nzQgnkSm-UTDkaqgdUGSHFpKhlIorL9ceKE4Be2OmPiUsgvOfDYrPMiv1PxtMEJQnFjUMztgbWBzA3wkULYejRLI5ySdRfza6LjddL2B4EXNylLp9kqz60zf8HgIoIxieWuw79O59HbZOoEw316zl2capdw/3s1/eAqjJBmjQiCrKeY_3mCIOg/h0/1pV_bWcrwqT076wNEFrV84H8PnFnPHCndGAx7mt7S4I)** | **PENDING** | **$7**
Linda W. | – | Contributed | N/A
Mark C. | – | Contributed | N/A
With critical elections coming up in 2023 and 2024, we cannot afford to miss a single fundraising goal. **That’s because the money we raise now will determine the quality of infrastructure we have for state Democrats in the future. If we hit our goals, we’ll be able to help build caucus programs, boost our digital ads programs, reach local voters, and much more.**
**State legislative races are overlooked and massively underfunded, so the money we raise now could be the difference between us winning or losing in 2023 and 2024. **
[Can you chip in an urgent $7 gift right now to help our team close the fundraising gap? Every dollar will be put to work helping elect state Democrats across the country.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHbAwXi1YWzwiVR22BOcczmU02rJ3rNjd414zPHBbx9efzte6n9ux93lqPqig9A1Cf0Vy8-_gzwaglTGqXrfcmqMDBHwGKQE34Nw71StRDmEo1qm6GlQ7xgb11kUEkvyz5VXF9sQoWOBLDyyu3C8bsnhEENyzcaykDQfmVXIr0XhtDDswx1LSStdcfCD2vMOW2ZKpuF-O6hpTTNb6w9B7y4-7qRijxfJX4gF9He9Kj9pa2xihj5zLcLGd9c17x2ZhCjpP2nQRk59AJAgJqqaCWiMb7CTgiODEu-VXebscVT6EypYNZk9qQrAsEaSLX_Ov__hMAQT6ndf0wBrWEEeOnGS3Vl6FvuWoB2oeFKhyG3BlEV5Rt4l-NPqld1K7GTXf2H4-NUc6x7_w7Es_-gLq_XZ1NkL_epKVYXMEg5nq-J-AKjEpaVAltJNJnC7UzclYhKTiJLm2G9Zg3V5M0KAFL4glBCV6FRqoet6Ce9M1VH5KigBy__iwxSMI6pFc195aY7mPbGR45-Lv8qRUePLmI5A/3s1/eAqjJBmjQiCrKeY_3mCIOg/h1/Xuyj5YSbu6ypEifIKAYQreziFYZJ0bi1Eo5GYja4dlk)
Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. That’s why we have to ask one more time:
[Be one of the top supporters in your area to fight back and power this movement: Rush a $7 donation to help us elect Democrats to statehouses across the country. Every donation will help us close the gap >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHbAwXi1YWzwiVR22BOcczmU02rJ3rNjd414zPHBbx9efzte6n9ux93lqPqig9A1Cf0Vy8-_gzwaglTGqXrfcmqMDBHwGKQE34Nw71StRDmEo1qm6GlQ7xgb11kUEkvyz5VXF9sQoWOBLDyyu3C8bsnhEENyzcaykDQfmVXIr0XhsPnkHH__imXP5uQHhXMqUxBnXqC_03OWulRitSzR27sxEVoBGBk2gJsGWdU26W2zFSW8gkrxIMvvbAIkTM0VILLtjKC8qH9aSnMFpT1rBJbynirOr2Au_pBQgWwcZfiL5IwdDTkBgR8dCeeA28YwzkqMCQFYkXFWb8P2id--OIKK_YujVBgZX9LoKUm4z5pN9miuiIF4-ChNeHogJv19TIU23dOifzWkSYGPioPnbzfZA3KRlaw1vJW7OEtG10kjdx58WGYss7dZjtHZeUZ57UbAePGuZaCqq484FL6_qxte5AmSJpPhI-Dxk9oEI76Tm8JsWMtqOKNz1yMN40AnVpYR18rnM9ONsSDkh8tcwWog/3s1/eAqjJBmjQiCrKeY_3mCIOg/h2/s9RSSc3bkWuPaOC790oPm7Chhd7zMUo84cqk_iH9TrU) If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: To help us catch up to our end-of-year goal, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. | | | | | Hi our end-of-year fundraising deadline is quickly approaching – and just today, we noticed that we are falling dangerously short of our final fundraising goal of the year. This time last month, our team had brought in 9,704 gifts – and this month we’ve only brought in 3,073. Can you take a look at what we have on record for you? | Name | Email | Status | Suggested Gift ---|---|---|--- Janet M. | – | Contributed | N/A On File | | PENDING | $7 Linda W. | – | Contributed | N/A Mark C. | – | Contributed | N/A With critical elections coming up in 2023 and 2024, we cannot afford to miss a single fundraising goal. That’s because the money we raise now will determine the quality of infrastructure we have for state Democrats in the future. If we hit our goals, we’ll be able to help build caucus programs, boost our digital ads programs, reach local voters, and much more. State legislative races are overlooked and massively underfunded, so the money we raise now could be the difference between us winning or losing in 2023 and 2024. Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. That’s why we have to ask one more time: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Peter,

We just wanted to make sure you saw Tedra’s important message about our midterms focus group. As we start approaching the next election cycle, we’re reaching out to committed supporters like you to help shape our strategy.

[_**You can fill out our midterm focus group survey here!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56024445/383601568/-1882276313?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWU0YjIwMS1kNjdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QGcCghG8aSruC1eryHewKMDsVo6gD6AgFpwNIbIlrE=&emci=8b049358-847c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=01e4b201-d67c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=30464261)

subject: This Happened to Us Again
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **THEY ARE TRYING TO SILENCE US!!!** Facebook just banned us for 24 hours. And YouTube still has two active strikes against us. This is the mountain we face when we try EXPOSING corruption. We're up against tremendous odds trying to protect liberty for the next generation. Do we give up and let the Radical Left, Big Tech and the Political Class win?
## NO WAY!!!!
These lunatics are really ramping things up. As you may know, the FDA and CDC just recently added the experimental COVID vaccine to the immunization schedule. With Democrats in full control of our state government, we are one step away from them adopting the CDC's recommendation and MANDATING it for your children. That means your child can't attend school, public or private, unless they get the experimental jab.
## There's NO WAY we're going to let this happen!
To help us FIGHT BACK, we are bringing on **Mark Bishofsky** of Stop the Mandate to our team. Mark is a true patriot. He gave up a long career as a respiratory therapist because he refused to get the experimental shot. That move forced Mark to become an activist overnight. He went from politically inactive to hosting rallies at the Capitol that numbered in the thousands. So we are honored to have Mark Bishofsky on our team, fighting in the trenches against the Radical Left that is trying to force experimental shots on our children. And this is a real threat. Did you see our article the other day about the MN Dept of Health urging parents to get their [6 month old babies vaccinated](https://www.action4liberty.com/governor_walz_dept_of_health_is_urging_parents_to_give_babies_experimental_shot?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=2)?!?! I don't need to convince you that the Democrats in Minnesota LOVE mandates and want to force us to take the jab. To add the experimental shot on the child immunization schedule they can either: **1\. Pass a bill in the Democrat controlled Legislature that adds the Experimental Jab to the Child Immunization Schedule or...** **2\. The Commissioner of Health can unilaterally add the Experimental Jab to the Child Immunization Schedule.** Either way, there's only **ONE WAY to STOP** this from becoming a frightening reality. WE MUST BRING POLITICAL HEAT ON VULNERABLE POLITICIANS! **When we went after rural Democrats last year on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, we forced that issue to the top. Eventually Walz himself had to sign the bill to end his own powers.** No other group has a plan and the tenacity to do what is needed to win. Other people try to befriend politicians and beg them to protect their liberties. That is a foolish strategy!!! WE DEMAND they protect our liberty or we go directly to their voters and expose them! Our strategy makes us hated by the Political Class, but I don't care, we're not in politics to win friends at the Capitol. We're in this arena because we want to PROTECT YOUR LIBERTY! But you know I absolutely can't do this with your help. We've assembled a top notch team of operatives to fight these battles in 2023, and I need the financial resources to fund this operation. **Please reach deep into your pockets and do what you can to help me fund this important battle!!!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=3)
---
If you made it to our Christmas Event last week, you saw the energy and power of our supporters. We packed the house!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=4)
But to be successful, we need tens of thousands of more people behind our effort. We MUST outnumber, out fundraise and out strategize the Radical Leftists who want to force vaccines on our children.
We have no other option. If we don't win this fight, we've lost it all. Bodily autonomy is the most basic and fundamental right of them all.
My whole team knows this is a MUST WIN issue!
**[Please help me fund this important mission with a donation today. Donate $25, $50, $100 or more to our STOP THE MANDATE program.](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=5)**
Thank you in advance!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_happened_to_us_again&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Charge Donald Trump [via VPP]
subject: Breaking Update from the January 6th Committee❗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
YES! YES! YES!
| | _BREAKING:_
**Jan. 6 Committee weighing Criminal Referrals as it prepares final report**

The Jan. 6th Committee has done their job and exposed Donald Trump’s role in the tragic January 6th Armed Insurrection.

**Millions of Americans are calling for Trump to be charged for his crimes.** But the DOJ won’t act without a surge of grassroots pressure! [****45,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Sign our petition to urge the DOJ to CHARGE Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes »****](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump_v2/?source=VPP_20221215_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5864%2E878179%2EsFT8uj) | [**TAKE 10 SECONDS TO SIGN: URGE THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE TO CHARGE DONALD TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump_v2/?source=VPP_20221215_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5864%2E878179%2EsFT8uj)
---
Listen, the January 6th Committee is working day-and-night to hold Donald Trump accountable for inciting the deadly Capitol Riots.

**_Now, the grassroots movement calling for Trump to be charged for his crimes is gaining some _serious_ momentum._**

But if we don’t act _right now_ , MAGA Republicans will try to stall the entire investigation... **and let Trump walk free...**

That’s why we’re gathering 45,000 Democrats on our petition urging the Department of Justice to bring criminal charges against Trump IMMEDIATELY.
[****Look, we can’t let Trump get away with trying to overthrow our government! Sign our petition ASAP to urge the Department of Justice to charge Donald Trump for his crimes »****](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump_v2/?source=VPP_20221215_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5864%2E878179%2EsFT8uj)
[**TAKE 10 SECONDS TO SIGN: URGE THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE TO CHARGE DONALD TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump_v2/?source=VPP_20221215_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5864%2E878179%2EsFT8uj)
---
Standing up for our democracy,

_\- Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5864%2E878179%2EsFT8uj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5864%2E878179%2EsFT8uj).**

name: MTG
subject: How we reclaim and win Georgia again (long email, please read when you have a few minutes)
body:
You’re going to want to hear what I have to say, it’s the only way we’ll ever win another national election.

Friend,

I'm reaching out today with a bit of a longer email, and I hope you'll take the time to read my thoughts on the future of the Republican Party and the roadmap to winning in states like Georgia again.

The media would have you believe that the Republican Party got crushed in the midterm elections, but they are lying to you in an effort to demoralize conservatives and avoid covering the impending investigations into Biden's impeachable offenses.

**I'm not taking the bait.** Instead I'm focusing on two things, holding the Biden Administration accountable as a member of the House Oversight Committee and positioning our party to win in 2024.

The electoral landscape has changed as a result of the rules Democrats unconstitutionally rammed through during COVID, and **[The Left has adapted far better than Republicans](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUMFunDAU_BpzA9kPbJIDhzarRGmlKJeoygk59oP1BtvsA4Q2Xx-DaA-VLEtv5nk8M9gIVQshFa-rzDZa6Q5t5hrgAAKE4sC5vCtkrURp72RlNZfGIqs4eu2GQotVE8XoCxN9dm66qks7aO6tllwIY2oBUhtxr6tOqLLLhuY8z-PEyh8MHtOZ0CyExeoCod1EEuY1XSI5zHtCDJh3kXITQ5qmKdGEZtDO5wLiSKx8XGbfTnEhg6w8rcRAbYhH6xafkN3oARrtR-36kOA9n8z93Lc2Bj27GNptOPK0xy89Ruqdbj8ofiLpHtujGvlXMoYZw5wUgxnyCd--3q631z_JqGrD4Gwi_gPPzqb8p5G_P4MVlFFjx9UNg5tUnYrt92K3OpPZwXW3htU_GcD-DGBvDq7vq6fl4n8_5a-_vvKrevFyI-Eh3fNtxH-bh0hx1ACsPn0D1COi4A).** Democrats understand that the election system they have built is no longer about voters, it's about ballots... [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFvnDAQhX-NuYHsAcP2wCHtaqO0UpTr9oKMPbBOsM0OILT59TWI5hDJsjTv2W9mPqxFWQkhS14VialVqTo0ia2BAwgQJQfO5SmTVSlyc5KFUVxqg6zg6JQdMiVWRRSCy3Rwya0WGn6YPFeF6URrWsy7lpvWdFVeQQGFTob6Ns_jxPInBpd4JtQLYbZaT2i2kKg5Re-BLKY9IXpMu0CpDj5W0xRtQj0o61IBYSSWX5bZNVNYSCPLzysxKDfFobGLi8o-6CFq5UZlex_lfT-ZurlvTPBqtsE3W3Hs0xxdegzUW9W0FD6QVI_NgUb-jwx-Rj_HRK-HVD6_na_j6e8Fot34wZpofBNv1sT9zyO_voARlFBtxtUOg53KKoLtd7AbzjjsYLtHzaqfDGD_BrCTg_t1dbS8uz_P6dvvz_Revjq5mfAr3vNjxK-XR0h2YABWnf8ByJug0w) ... And the only way we'll ever get back to **paper ballots on Election DAY** (Not Election MONTH) is by beating them in 2024.

As you know, we've suffered some heartbreaking losses in Georgia over the past two election cycles, and if we're going to reclaim our advantage in Georgia, we must make some changes.

Democrats have waged war on our elections, and if we're going to win again, we must meet them where they are fighting.

**When they ballot harvest, we must ballot harvest.**

**When they vote early, we must vote early.**

**When they vote by mail, we must vote by mail.**

**_When they litigate, we must litigate._**

**[This requires an entire rethinking and restructuring of our campaign operation in Georgia, and it must start now](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFvnDAQhX8N3ED2gM3ugUPb1TZppSrKLSfktQevE2yTAYTSXx-DSA-VLEvznv1m5sOWy4ZzIVlT56ZVUvVoctcCA-DAJQPGxKkUjeSVOYnaKCa0waxm6JUbSsVXRRSjL3X0-T2lGa1QMH2uxFnUt0rw_sxuHE5Msro_50N7n-dxyqpvGVzTmVAvhOXqAqHZQpLmFb1GclhYQgxY9JEKHUOqpinZhHpQzhcc4khZdV1m301xIY1ZdVkpA7kpHo1bfFL2QQ9RKz8qZ0OS9_1E4WfbmRjU7GLotuLYpzu6WIxknepuFN-QlMXuQCO-ImOYMcwpMeihsKt9hub6UL8luwuDM8n4T7w7k_a_jOzlEQynnFozrm4Y3CSbBNbuYDecadjB9R9t1nzPAPZvADs5eH9ZPS2v_vfP4unX3-Jd_vFiM-FHuuePEf-9PELKAwNkzeUTJ3igJQ).**

You may be wondering why we must start now, the next election is 2 years away. I'll tell you why, because the Democrats in Georgia are already working and winning the 2024 election for Joe Biden.

We must match their investment and execute a superior strategy, amd it is the only way we will win.

I know you're probably tired of receiving fundraising emails from Republicans, especially ones who end up losing. This email isn't about losing, and I don't even consider it fundraising. **[I'm asking you to make an investment in my effort to flip Georgia red and deliver the 16 electoral college votes to President Trump in 2024](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFr3DAQhX-NfbORxpaUPfjQdklpAiGHEsjJaKVZrVJLcsY2Jvn1lY3TQ0EI5j3pzcyHHZeKcyGZakvbaamvaEvfAQPgwCUDxsRdLZTkjb0TrdVMGItFyzBoP9Sar5oopVCbFMpbd2HqZCVcW2tEIw0YwU9KMN2qEzKDl3LobvM8TkXzrYD7fCY0C2G9-khot5CsBU1viTxWjhAjVtdElUkxV9OUbUIzaB8qDmmkorlf5tBPaSGDRXNeqQC5KQGtX0JW9kEP0egwau9ilvf9RBVm19sU9exT7Lfi2Kc_ujhM5LzuL5T-IGmH_YFGfEWmOGOcc2I0Q_W5_H66vDinnrPdx8HbbPwn3rzN-59H9voLLKeSOjuufhj8JFUG63awG8487OCvH12hvhcA-zeAnRy8v66Blrfw-LN6fvis3uVTEJsJP_I9f4z47-URUh8YoFDnv4_yoZw).** [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFPhDAQhX9NuUHaAVo9cFA3GjUxXjx4It12lq3SFgeQ6K-3EPRg0jSZN-2beR82QiohaslVldlGS31Cm7kGOIAAITlwXl8UtZKitBd1ZTWvjUVWcfTa9YUWiyaK0Rcm-uzcVKgApVLGSM0v8VgqKIXBk9RCoD6arG_O0zSMrLxicJvOiGYmLBYXCO1qkjSv6S2Sw7wjxID5KVJuYkjVOKY2oem187mAOBArb-fJt2OcySArDwsxkKvi0brZJ2VbdBeN9oN2XUjylq_O_dS1NgY9uRjatdjztPuUDiN1TrdHiu9IusN2R1P_WsYwYZiSYzB9fujg4cZ-vlQpm2xD72xq_BPPzqb8h4G_3oMVlFFjh8X1vRulSmC7DeyKMy3bu9NXw9Q1A9i-AWzk4ON18TS_-ce7_PnhO_-QT75em3CT7ulrwL-Xu0mxYwCmDj-6_qEM) I know how to win and turn out voters in Georgia, I've done it twice in my district, and I'm going to do it again in 2024, but I need to keep my campaign fully staffed and expand our operation to reach voters who stayed home in 2020 and 2022.

Over the course of the next year we're going to be investing heavily in data, focused very heavily on early voters and mail voters. We just can't afford to go into Election Day with less early and mail votes than the Democrats. It's a recipe for disaster and disappointment.

**[That's why I'm asking you to invest early in our effort to beat the Democrats at their new game](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFPrTAQhX9N2UHocNteFyz03viiL3lxqxvS2w7c-miLAwT111sIujBpmsw57ZmZD2suFedCluqQ2VpL3aLNXA0lAAcuSyhLcSyEkryyR3GwuhTGIjuU6LXrC80XTRSjL0z02bWW6mI5aFDV5YKGt9LgzVG0NwKVTWEi6-vrNA0jq24Z3KczopkJi8UFQruGJM1reo3kMO8IMWDeRspNDKkax2QTml47n3OIA7Hqfp58M8aZDLLqvBADuSoerZt9UrZBd9FoP2jXhSRv-4ncT11jY9CTi6FZi32fZu_SYaTO6eZC8T-S7rDZ0YjvyBgmDFNKDKbPT-_n08tp0XJOdhN6Z5PxS7w6m_Y_D-XzA1hOGdV2WFzfu1GqBLbbwK4407C9az9qpu4YwPYNYCMHb8-Lp_nV__2TPz1-5m_ynxerCad0Tx8D_rzcQ4odAzB1_gKi26Fb).**

Anything you can give will go directly to laying the necessary groundwork to build a winning campaign in Georgia in 2024.

In Liberty,

Marjorie
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFPrTAQhX9N2UHagcK9CxbveXONmhhXL9EN6W0HbpW2OEBQf_0rBF2YNE3mnM7pzIe1KCshZMmrIjG1KlWLJrE1cAABouTAuTxksipFbg6yMIpLbZAVHJ2yfabEoohCcJkOLrnWHA55VbQSZKHNpeLicimwFcf8eIx9Jk_6-jpNw8jyPwzO8YyoZ8JssZ7QrCFRc4peA1lMO0L0mLaBUh18rMYx2oS6V9alAsJALD_Pk2vGMJNGlp8WYlCuikNjZxeVbdBd1MoNynY-ytt-MnVT15jg1WSDb9Zi36fZf-kwUGdVc6HwhqQ6bHY08jsy-An9FBO97tMX-vcBx7Me82g3vrcmGr_EqzVx_9PAn-_ACEqoNsNi-96OZRXBdhvYFWcctrftZ82qvwxgawPYyMH78-JofnUPt-nT_Vf6Xj46uZpwE-_pc8Cfl3tItmMAVp3-A-fYoNg)

clean_body: You’re going to want to hear what I have to say, it’s the only way we’ll ever win another national election. Friend, I'm reaching out today with a bit of a longer email, and I hope you'll take the time to read my thoughts on the future of the Republican Party and the roadmap to winning in states like Georgia again. The media would have you believe that the Republican Party got crushed in the midterm elections, but they are lying to you in an effort to demoralize conservatives and avoid covering the impending investigations into Biden's impeachable offenses. I'm not taking the bait. Instead I'm focusing on two things, holding the Biden Administration accountable as a member of the House Oversight Committee and positioning our party to win in 2024. The electoral landscape has changed as a result of the rules Democrats unconstitutionally rammed through during COVID, and . Democrats understand that the election system they have built is no longer about voters, it's about ballots... ... And the only way we'll ever get back to paper ballots on Election DAY (Not Election MONTH) is by beating them in 2024. As you know, we've suffered some heartbreaking losses in Georgia over the past two election cycles, and if we're going to reclaim our advantage in Georgia, we must make some changes. Democrats have waged war on our elections, and if we're going to win again, we must meet them where they are fighting. When they ballot harvest, we must ballot harvest. When they vote early, we must vote early. When they vote by mail, we must vote by mail. When they litigate, we must litigate. . You may be wondering why we must start now, the next election is 2 years away. I'll tell you why, because the Democrats in Georgia are already working and winning the 2024 election for Joe Biden. We must match their investment and execute a superior strategy, amd it is the only way we will win. I know you're probably tired of receiving fundraising emails from Republicans, especially ones who end up losing. This email isn't about losing, and I don't even consider it fundraising. . I know how to win and turn out voters in Georgia, I've done it twice in my district, and I'm going to do it again in 2024, but I need to keep my campaign fully staffed and expand our operation to reach voters who stayed home in 2020 and 2022. Over the course of the next year we're going to be investing heavily in data, focused very heavily on early voters and mail voters. We just can't afford to go into Election Day with less early and mail votes than the Democrats. It's a recipe for disaster and disappointment. . Anything you can give will go directly to laying the necessary groundwork to build a winning campaign in Georgia in 2024. In Liberty, Marjorie Greene for Congress, Inc. 3 Central Plaza #142 Rome, GA 30161

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this wasn’t
the email we had hoped to send you tonight.

But as a grassroots powered organization we want to be really transparent
with you. Based on this morning’s fundraising, we’re not on track to reach
our $120,000 2024 Candidate Recruitment Goal.

We don’t have billionaire bankrollers or take a dime from corporate PACs,
all of our work is funded by people donating $5, $15, or even $50 at a
time. If we don’t see a major influx in our fundraising in the next 48
hours, we’re going to have to start looking at where to make budget cuts
and that’s going to impact the work we need to do.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123261?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20221215-26576&t=1001&akid=26576%2E1203867%2EopSMdK ]Will you support our work to find the next progressive fighter like AOC
and Summer Lee by rushing in $3 right now?

We are in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party and we can’t afford
to slow down. Every cycle we face millions of dollars from the right-wing
and the political establishment and your contributions mean so much to us
to help us fight back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123261?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20221215-26576&t=1002&akid=26576%2E1203867%2EopSMdK ]If you can spare it, please pitch in before midnight.

Thank you so much for everything,

Team JD

name: Special Election Updates (via DLCC.org)
subject: These elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats
body:
We’re less than one month away from the first special election of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. | | |
---
| | **The clock is racing towards the first special elections of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January.** Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why:
* Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a _handful_ of votes.
* And after state Democrats’ historic wins this year, state Republicans will be looking for _any_ power-building opportunities they can find.
* **We’ve been outraised by Republicans every quarter this year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats _today._**

We need grassroots Democrats like you, to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. **Can we count on you today?** [Rush $7 right now to give state Democrats the support they need to secure victories in elections across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_T2zyTQu244Uf_Vel4qq1wxdfmheLTDcuAKS7BB9YfuT7iAVzY1mmJhruDL7Fh-K3PQNJ8UauRrmZ4Q1RQDWBtmlYi702laj27MtbyIkrsFAvFaaTmm95J7cUdgvveyIStZ2fBqLU8BAsyUEB_G0bsnOr91n1KoxnFwlr4T3ZrrRc2ILlVFQEy-DADKm-ZAMBlyQqOXJYT7sf1HcRKT8RedvymPBU53GNaws0f6-ubmmzDjZR2kTjW0jhTlBEbMo-DpBzzXjCvtD-ChfbhwKD5Wb-trL_dm2-RmQBMWVsqwy9bmgABNWEioSOjn3-J4up5FLuS13H2ODHvCTJ65moj8MfXhUBiPfb34MiToLIi9d8AwY-J7VdKNQpoVEi2D4N3J01rCpLIu2F9GWXg-vjVU1VzTp8zxgWyhHE_RbNPTEjR0zpZPUWspnhumu0S7c/3s1/fCcAjr5hQayj7VB6IkS9pw/h0/50n4trfpxfXXJfzNNJURgM69uDY_UQpp1k8gHg9Sq1A) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Democratic majorities aren’t built in a day – or even within a single election cycle. They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. **Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.**
That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today.
[_Will you chip in $7 today to help Democrats secure victories in special elections and build Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide?_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_T2zyTQu244Uf_Vel4qq1wxdfmheLTDcuAKS7BB9YfuT7iAVzY1mmJhruDL7Fh-K3PQNJ8UauRrmZ4Q1RQDWBtmlYi702laj27MtbyIkrsFAvFaaTmm95J7cUdgvveyIStZ2fBqLU8BAsyUEB_G0bsnOr91n1KoxnFwlr4T3ZrrxLnbg8BgvYo-ysZkbcZU9-gtn8CCM3-6gAScIpXDGy2A93BV2uOSX_cqulCUiWxUMK3laoUGaCDzp6zPus1rFg9TUIe3wrKkDhGWqy9GaM_tcfGJ8Xiyk_Rgq2NfShNagLsJ7vzkPGPc2C3YmpvvTjVPqmgj99_j2E0aB1zu8CPu0q6rIHreysUFqnycvHaBMcGAos-EbJ9R6H42IegNlzNBuCRujyV9WuyaXGFMleQW0uMYDTW2ZAQq-RsKOg7IX5sFPauUM-oHHO9FTYnSs/3s1/fCcAjr5hQayj7VB6IkS9pw/h6/-UOHOog7AMEAymOd9Uo5hXa182e5GIdz6dbLPA96aQg)

Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why: Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a handful of votes. And after state Democrats’ historic wins this year, state Republicans will be looking for any power-building opportunities they can find. We’ve been outraised by Republicans every quarter this year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats today. We need grassroots Democrats like you, to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. Can we count on you today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Democratic majorities aren’t built in a day – or even within a single election cycle. They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.** That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today. Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7521%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p6wocd%2bBTeISGk4xATxG7Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97953%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s6mRhMs19MlHda%2f1VVrOEA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97954%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2rVIloW9qd8YeqeVnVOnoA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97954%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2rVIloW9qd8YeqeVnVOnoA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7521%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p6wocd%2bBTeISGk4xATxG7Q&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7521%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p6wocd%2bBTeISGk4xATxG7Q&sysid=1)

name: Frances Hui
subject: The cruelty in China
body:
When I was 14, I faced tear gas and pepper spray while fighting for my home.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkiiddmhni0ttjb91djcpcejtr7qo09vtfhbrv70_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
Friend,

When I was 14, I faced tear gas and pepper spray while fighting for my home.

You see, I grew up in a city owned by a country I don't belong to.

**Hong Kong is a city that was once free.**

The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison.

With my record of activism and participating in protests, I only had two options:
1. Wait for the CCP to knock down my door and arrest me.
2. Or leave my home and continue the fight.

_Now, I am the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America_.

My name is Frances Hui -- former journalist, director of We The Hongkongers, and speaker with the Dissident Project.

The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide.

The American media doesn't like to talk about China.
**But I 'm not afraid to share my story. **That's why I am asking for your help to educate 10,000 students about the tyranny in China.

[_**Can you help me connect with these students by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg3o433q8spf86t07nrsp5fab5qfvipv039et4m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)

This is just a small part of my story and what I want to share with 10,000 students.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znoknl9sbqbhqlea19ejatn0n4u4h01h5j2rc3s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)

China is the 21st-century version of totalitarianism. And the CCP's takeover of Hong Kong has left no part of our lives untouched. They are turning Hong Kong into China.

The Chinese Communist Party has done its best to silence any news of opposition.

This is why the Dissident Project is so valuable. _**It might be the only time these high school students get to hear the truth**_ about how life in Hong Kong has radically changed since being under the thumb of the CCP.

**I want to share my story with students across America. **

[_**Will you help me reach more high school students with my story? Your generous gift helps me travel to high schools across the country. Please donate by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl8pc371g65n7ahq2g2ova3hm0he0km4g89rbbo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)

**Let me share how the Dissident Project works:**

Dissident Project speakers come from countries like Venezuela, Cuba, North Korea, and China.

We undergo a rigorous audition and training process. There we learn to communicate our experiences in a _powerful but compassionate_ way.

Topics like this can be tough for students to understand, but _we have learned how to address students and have mastered the art of covering difficult and complex issues for young audiences. _

The Dissident Project is a not-for-profit endeavor. We don't charge schools for access to our speakers, so their testimonies are more accessible to all.

**But to keep our services completely free, we rely on the generosity of our donors. Will you chip in today and support the Dissident Project?**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdo5l9oe16hqtap5lr4tcmoivea2l4v064j79450_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl1p1e8of3j70uttummeicl1ajtqnkcu9kdsot5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn13th0qkao3p0s3baiei2btbf1a69qk6b59jm4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg8mvul1pipd95g4us146117tb6cdrr3aa3i83ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3m21quv22ag4u07f4f08p0l8jpt2p793kv73kl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z56dql1fli1bm1cdi3c7ha1jqk0sh045flasf38o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6v96n782botibp6ondqn62dt9t4ja6i1g5hga3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob4c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Frances Hui

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

name: Pro Life Update
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z029f7jsqvoe9n18kefa7qa38bs8auu7kf127tpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob2cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z492342cl658q52n2si3nrflo63dr5aj7tgeipi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob2cjh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk37c8hl7uld9jos6g62h246do634f95gu8tt470_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjvmh989au2suo4tqe35313gfqbk5e5g7vkgf3ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob2cjh2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt29nvng7u2lnmigm8okbq0174ckneja8rpak6oo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chi61o71c9ie49fg)

body:

Before I have to move on to another patriot.

|
---
| | | 🚨🚨 **LAST AND FINAL CALL TO CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY** 🚨🚨

Hi there Steven,

This is your _**LAST AND FINAL CALL**_ to secure your signed copy of my new memoir, _Not My First Rodeo_! Because fewer than 50 signed copies remain!

Copies have been flying off the shelves, and we are down to our last box. I wish I could sign a copy for every conservative supporter, but sadly this exclusive offer must come to a close.

_**[So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43890%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bfLwB6Y4pyAGaQOuLyKUvQ&sysid=1 "So here is ONE LAST CHANCE
to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!")**_

---

**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43892%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t5ffLu9CgXiP7Ook68qwow&sysid=1 "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I’ll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

This memoir is incredibly important for every Conservative to read because America must return to the values my ranch upbringing instilled in me like: grit, hard work, and rugged individualism.
**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**

Thanks,

Kristi Noem
Governor of South Dakota

body:

_Friend -- what an honor!_
To advisors at Republican HQ just handpicked your name to receive EARLY ACCESS to our [**Official 2023 Election Integrity Survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl9pst2qjgsluhqnbjjhrfaiegtvijqpdonjqj80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chge1ob2c5h2bs).

Are you ready?

We need your response by tonight so incoming members of Congress can hit the ground running.

Republican HQ

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2vtvj8ic44p1p8rda0nqa08eiknahll4c4uedbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie0oj6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z37u7sg208qbmdsqk05l80pnc7viji7hd38mv3qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie0oj6c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf8gkug41hdv7kdkmcvhev405gpsp419ec62e4ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie0oj6c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zojqe44hsau5vdir5igkndufj1du25jjd9057qeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie0oj6c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Brianna
subject: “...fundamentally reshape the American democracy.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team,
You’re not alone in this fight. This moment for fair democracy is so pivotal for all of us. Check out a few quotes on the _Moore v. Harper_ case from recent news in the **Charlotte Observer:**
**“lawsuit of great moment.”**
**“the most important case for American democracy in the almost two and a half centuries since America’s founding.”**
**“fundamentally reshape the American democracy.”**
The decision, in this case, will decide whether legislators who have displayed an unparalleled and unethical desire to be free of the foundational obligations of democracy and justice will gain political power in federal elections.
We prepared for this moment and the fight for fair maps is far from over. All On The Line organizers and our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, made sure North Carolina voters have their voices heard during the redistricting process and in court in 2019 and 2022. Now, we are shifting our focus to the 2023 and redraws throughout the country.
[**All On The Line team is mobilizing to prepare for the United States Supreme Court ruling in _Moore v. Harper_. Donate today to help us remain proactive in the fight for fair maps and elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56027694/383633654/742344613?refcode=20221215_AOTL_F_reshpdem_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhNDE0ZjMxLTM5N2QtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PWOkoSRlWBDmW8DCna8V8-SUik_8OQPfRXMWGw8jE_M=)

**Remember, the fight for fair democracy is far from over. We must continue to mobilize grassroots activists across the country** to advocate for redraws where gerrymandered maps still exist and prevent underrepresented groups from having a voice in policy decision-making and at the ballot box.
_Let’s continue to exemplify the strength of fair democracy -- people matter, not politics._
For democracy,
Brianna Shamsuddoha

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3v8a5g97p7sb87jren3fkllgiufm1pamq05ge50_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie4o34cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd1e1gv5kcnvs5fjpmk62edkqfhcd155805ms2a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie4o34cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc8hdtnchpltoj065slbk8hpcf6b48rk0rnt9qdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chie4o34cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2z15fr5tl9c1bmqs57781jbs9vk1q5adp8gdqiln0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkdc0v3smp1mnmiucof7l01i83ukb2ika7bkhceg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chi69oj0chhm49fg)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: As a nation we have turned slowly away
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7502%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r7XVqWAVAds0YSW8G2kY3Q&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77468%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wg0z9GJC5Vg3FqVDucc5Kw&sysid=1)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_“I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth --that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’”_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77468%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wg0z9GJC5Vg3FqVDucc5Kw&sysid=1)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms--and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77469%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cz6tZ8AnzxI0gCfgpSyVDg&sysid=1)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77460%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8OMxQ%2baYLLEPfUfQnTcFLQ&sysid=1)** There is hope for the future of America--and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7502%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r7XVqWAVAds0YSW8G2kY3Q&sysid=1)_

+
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7502%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r7XVqWAVAds0YSW8G2kY3Q&sysid=1)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: End child mutilation now
body:
Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis.
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American,Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis._Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.”I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive.**I need your help to fund this legal battle.**[**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhsab9edkcknsujgndlahp45v1kqslkiscoiv74o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor2c1h2bs) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case.When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy.She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.”**Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe.They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood.Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them.Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug.**Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable.My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice.So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe.Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them.Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbhhcitlvks5sg4dm16hrs6qvd9g98h588838h78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor2c1h2bs) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests.But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere.Will you stand with her?Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgiumkqi76tdlfgv28j60kd91475uncup322a8f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor2c1h2bs)

[**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift of $35 more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zochjq6ord071kcqfb25mjme56uoitvr8faj6g50_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor2c1h2bs)

clean_body: Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. | | | | My fellow concerned American,Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis.Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.”I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria. The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive.I need your help to fund this legal battle. Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case.When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy.She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.”Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.” Then, doctors lied to Chloe.They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself. We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood.Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them.Specifically, they gave herLupon Depot to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug.Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her. And it’s time to hold them accountable.My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice.So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe.Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them.Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported $8 billion profit in 2021 alone. These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests.But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere.Will you stand with her?Thank you for supporting our mission today. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z65ot72vk7ta3cu36c4pv6v40i768a5em28oi4mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4dplqt7shgb7bf1cl638mmvepjpl5jk0nq0vi00_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor6c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zme3r1kpnc1uts5omnkjgof113suursn9omas3rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor6c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9177brqldlg46v49jbup5fc167kdds45vkmhlu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chieaor6c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Lila Rose
subject: You are needed: Babies at risk
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
#
Friend of life,

As someone passionate to end abortion, you need to know what’s been going on the last few weeks.

Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, millions of dollars have poured into pro-abortion groups.

Planned Parenthood and NARAL Pro-Choice America saw overall contributions increase from $630,000 to roughly $2.3 million in just three months. Every donation represents another baby in danger of death by abortion.

Meanwhile, pro-life groups accross the country are struggling to keep up as donors have stopped giving. Too many people have viewed the end of Roe v. Wade at the end of the battle, when it is just the beginning.

We need to activate 100 people before midnight tonight so we can stay in the fight and reach 34,000 moms before it’s too late. Will you take a stand with us? Give $10 right now:

**[https://give.liveaction.org/stand-up-to-big-abortion/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-w7-tNFw)**

Friend of Life - this is a David vs. Goliath battle.

We are up against a billion-dollar industry and lobby with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education - and Planned Parenthood and its allies are increasing their spending and political action ahead of the mid-term elections.

Why?

Because they want to ensure that Americans reject the Court’s ruling on Roe v. Wade and expand abortion nationwide, rather than end it once and for all.

Polls are showing that Americans are increasing in their support of Abortion rights. The 24/7 media barrage funded by committed pro-abortion donors is working and if we don’t move quickly, all of our progress the last 40 years may disappear.

We have no time to lose and your gift RIGHT NOW of as little as $10 will save babies from being poisoned, torn apart, and suctioned from their mother’s wombs: **[https://give.liveaction.org/stand-up-to-big-abortion/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**

Your unwavering conviction and commitment to this fight is why I have hope for our future. We will prevail and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._spJ2LLJZsfCsIDQOeBQ)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
P.O. clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Friend of life, As someone passionate to end abortion, you need to know what’s been going on the last few weeks. Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, millions of dollars have poured into pro-abortion groups. Planned Parenthood and NARAL Pro-Choice America saw overall contributions increase from $630,000 to roughly $2.3 million in just three months. Every donation represents another baby in danger of death by abortion. Meanwhile, pro-life groups accross the country are struggling to keep up as donors have stopped giving. Too many people have viewed the end of Roe v. Wade at the end of the battle, when it is just the beginning. We need to activate 100 people before midnight tonight so we can stay in the fight and reach 34,000 moms before it’s too late. Will you take a stand with us? Give $10 right now: Friend of Life - this is a David vs. Goliath battle. We are up against a billion-dollar industry and lobby with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education - and Planned Parenthood and its allies are increasing their spending and political action ahead of the mid-term elections. Why? Because they want to ensure that Americans reject the Court’s ruling on Roe v. Wade and expand abortion nationwide, rather than end it once and for all. Polls are showing that Americans are increasing in their support of Abortion rights. The 24/7 media barrage funded by committed pro-abortion donors is working and if we don’t move quickly, all of our progress the last 40 years may disappear. We have no time to lose and your gift RIGHT NOW of as little as $10 will save babies from being poisoned, torn apart, and suctioned from their mother’s wombs: Your unwavering conviction and commitment to this fight is why I have hope for our future. We will prevail and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time. For life, Lila Rose Founder and President 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 P.O.
