name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Don’t Throw in the Towel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
They want you to stop helping Black conservatives win elections.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62084420:JyHpTGGNj:m:1:3334294963:9BEDD55B820D294C23C33604E428D5F3:r "Video") Peter: You ready to throw in the towel now that Herschel lost? You're doing EXACTLY what the Left wants you to do! They want you to give up. They want you to stop helping Black conservatives win elections. The Democrats are on the cusp of losing their vice-like grip over Black voters and they're praying you'll just lick your wounds and go home after Herschel's loss. **[Now is NOT the time to give up! Despite the narrative from the Left, we're making gains in the Black community. That's why we need your donation to continue our fight to bring Black voters to the Republican Party.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62084420:JyHpTGGNj:m:1:3334294963:9BEDD55B820D294C23C33604E428D5F3:r "Now is NOT the time to give up! Despite the
narrative from the Left, we’re making gains in the Black community. That’s why we need your $25, $50, or $100 donation to continue our
fight to bring Black voters to the Republican Party.")** For every Herschel race we lost, we won new seats in Congress and re-elected Black conservatives. Just look at John James and Wesley Hunt and how we helped re-elect Byron Donalds! And let's not forget how we moved Black Voters to elect Glen Youngkin and Winsome Sears in 2021. **The 2022 Election had more than 80 Black Candidates on the ballot before the primaries took place. That historic number stood out to Black Voters and gave us a chance to explain why so many were running as Republicans.** **[So, lick your wounds and get back in the fight by chipping in today to help us organize Black Voters and bring them to the GOP once and for all!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62084420:JyHpTGGNj:m:1:3334294963:9BEDD55B820D294C23C33604E428D5F3:r "So, lick your wounds and get back in the fight
by chipping in $50, $100, or $250 today to help us organize Black Voters and bring them to the GOP once and for all!")** While the race for U.S. Senate in Georgia didn't turn out as we hoped for, it clearly proves why we must start organizing Black voters NOW, but only if you want them to vote Republican in 2024. **Yes, I said 2024. Campaigns are already starting to organize, and we need to be right in the thick of it.** We always need to be reaching out to Black communities early and often to show Black voters an alternative to government dependence and the pathway to the American Dream! **There 's too much at stake for you to sit on the sidelines. With a divided Congress, we're going to need you involved more than ever.** Inflation, abortion, gun rights... you name it. All of it's on the line now. Which is why we must start TODAY working to bring Black Americans over to the Party of Lincoln. **[Even a $50 donation of whatever amount you can afford will make the difference. We need you on our team, not on the sidelines.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62084421:JyHpTGGNj:m:1:3334294963:9BEDD55B820D294C23C33604E428D5F3:r "Even a $50 donation of
whatever amount you can afford will make the difference. We need you on our team, not on the sidelines.")** Don't delay. Don't give up. The next battle for Black voters has already begun. Whether they come over to the Republican Party is up to you. **[Help us keep the Journey going. Donate today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62084420:JyHpTGGNj:m:1:3334294963:9BEDD55B820D294C23C33604E428D5F3:r "Help us keep the Journey going. Donate today!")** For a New Journey, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62084420:JyHpTGGNj:m:1:3334294963:9BEDD55B820D294C23C33604E428D5F3:r "James
Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

name: American Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0291%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=e0gFR3V5%2bUNv3FfwgYIjkw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hTZAQUDljEfpTIiqx8sbXw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bEXtU%2by7O%2fYBi9kiLyA1yg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43818%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sv0BXk20UbIQYD2p3ZeJnA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0291%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=e0gFR3V5%2bUNv3FfwgYIjkw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0291%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=e0gFR3V5%2bUNv3FfwgYIjkw&sysid=1)

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Happy Holidays from Team NPP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Congratulations to NPP Board Member Rep. Joanna McClinton
NPP board member Rep. Joanna McClinton was recently sworn in as Pennsylvania’s House Majority Leader. We can’t think of a better way to end the year!
Georgia also understood the assignment.
Team NPP was back on the ground in Savannah to continue aiding The New Georgia Project in knocking more than 800,000 doors to help Senator Warnock win the 51st seat in the U.S. Senate. Thank you to all of the organizers and supporters who helped make this happen.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/614E4C564C6A6E79454862452B327677554B4952673562666F5643337A396268566D442B727937644F4665365A577170316230795168646534394F7A67567030/editor_images/Image%20%282%29.jpeg]
NPP In The News
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/36357A36365A324B613454497174725758685166724C65716379616B364A474E425152343541714631574278726462645370334C574377425771395866493735/editor_images/Screenshot%202022-12-12%20at%204.36.01%20PM.png]
NPP CEO Kadida Kenner joins We Talk Weekly to talk about engaging voters.
Watch the full segment here. [https://youtu.be/GAlCZGghHFg]
PA lawmakers agree on one thing: the commonwealth needs to rewrite its election laws.
Then, the disagreements start. Read the full article featuring NPP's Kadida Kenner here [https://www.wesa.fm/politics-government/2022-12-13/advocates-lawmakers-hope-pa-house-power-shift-opens-door-for-election-law-changes] .
We’re hiring a chief of staff and regional organizing directors for various regions statewide.
Check out all of our open positions on our Careers page. [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/]

.

*
In
a
public
ceremony
at
the
Capitol
on
Monday,
Republican
Leader
Bryan
Cutler
(R-Lancaster)
was
sworn-in
to
office
and
claimed
the
mantle
of
House
Majority
Leader,
Politics
PA
reports.
[https://www.politicspa.com/cutler-sworn-in-claims-house-majority-leader-role/116304/]

*
Democrats
say
they
are
now
in
control
of
the
Pennsylvania
House
after
their
top
leader
had
herself
sworn
in
a
month
before
the
new
legislative
session
begins
in
order
to
schedule
three
critical
special
elections,
Spotlight
PA
reports.
[https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2022/12/pa-2022-election-state-house-specials-joanna-mcclinton]

*
Pennsylvania
House
Republicans
have
filed
a
lawsuit
to
block
three
legislative
special
elections
from
taking
place
in
February,
potentially
delaying
a
clear-cut
majority
for
Democrats
and
allowing
the
GOP
to
maintain
some
measure
of
power
into
spring,
Spotlight
PA
reports.
[https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2022/12/pa-house-majority-special-elections-republican-lawsuit/]

Supreme
Court
will
hear
oral
argument
on
Wednesday
in
a
case
that
UCLA
law
professor
Richard
Hasen
has
called
the
“800-pound
gorilla”
of
election
law,
Scotus
blog
reports.

In a public ceremony at the Capitol on Monday, Republican Leader Bryan Cutler (R-Lancaster) was sworn-in to office and claimed the mantle of House Majority Leader, Politics PA reports. [] Democrats say they are now in control of the Pennsylvania House after their top leader had herself sworn in a month before the new legislative session begins in order to schedule three critical special elections, Spotlight PA reports. [] Pennsylvania House Republicans have filed a lawsuit to block three legislative special elections from taking place in February, potentially delaying a clear-cut majority for Democrats and allowing the GOP to maintain some measure of power into spring, Spotlight PA reports. [] * The Supreme Court will hear oral argument on Wednesday in a case that UCLA law professor Richard Hasen has called the “800-pound gorilla” of election law, Scotus blog reports. [] Happy Holidays from Team NPP It’s time to recharge for 2023. Please note that The New Pennsylvania Project will shut down operations from December 24th through January 2nd for collective rest. Wishing you the best in the new year! Your support goes a long way. In the spirit of giving, please consider making a contribution to help us build for 2023 and 2024. Make a Tax Deductible Contribution [] All Other Contributions [] The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible. | Peter,
Desperate Swamp Insiders have resorted to flooding my office with phone calls, BEGGING me to toe the party line and cast a vote for Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House.
It's getting sad at this point...
The Washington Establishment knows that I am not trusting an alligator to Drain the Swamp as our next Speaker of the House.
I prefer my leaders NOT to be owned by the lobbyists!
And even though this Only Kevin crowd SAYS they don't need my vote to anoint Big Tech and Wall Street's favorite "Republican" to the role of Speaker...
Their last-ditch effort to bully me into voting McCarthy tells a different story.
But I won't give in - no matter how much they treat my phone line like Kevin McCarthy treats K Street, I will NOT cave in to the Establishment's demands!
---

| There is too much at stake for anything less than our 'A Team' right now, Peter.
This is a moment to FIGHT, and Cavin' McCarthy's first instinct is FLIGHT!
We need to be demanding investigations and impeachments for the pain the Regime has caused the American People.
We need to be taking over Pelosi and Cheney's UnSelect Witch Hunt Committee and using it to expose the FEDSURRECTION.
We need to be cutting off every last one of your tax dollars that is blindly being funneled to the Ukraine gravy train!
These are important fights, Peter, in which we can't afford anything less than our most assertive leadership possible.
The Swamp "Republicans" know where I stand on this, and they're BEGGING me to have a change of heart.
Help me show them that MAGA patriots will not be backing down one inch.
[Make sure your party leadership in Washington actually fights for YOUR interests by helping me hold the line and demanding better than a Speaker who sides with Liz Cheney, Big Tech, and the lobbyists!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00160xW5u2uJOcEuBCNg8qM2lWgliwCD8FESbyN3PBRFscApAom4pD6jNUwWY2VBqKvJUHwt6bsANc8mwkJPxSWqHpaQ5Uc6glOhofAsmqLDnqoQmVh2YIne1FU_DHIg_YQrqSPT4rBK29nWZJR0skkoVQe0uZgnqBjWkFb26PpKOPIjXT7___s7vZlX8Tuwwni3fmUe9-lEOM=&c=C1J6-_kIvaWEdBtdq9MGvLR6-Dt2ZKoP8MZgm3AGechHGNGnWsMiWQ==&ch=Cpi8uy720K1mKcRx7N9k49jzvwLsRp8sglwTy4kImShvZCkxi0hi9A==)

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, Desperate Swamp Insiders have resorted to flooding my office with phone calls, BEGGING me to toe the party line and cast a vote for Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House. It's getting sad at this point... The Washington Establishment knows that I am not trusting an alligator to Drain the Swamp as our next Speaker of the House. I prefer my leaders NOT to be owned by the lobbyists! And even though this Only Kevin crowd SAYS they don't need my vote to anoint Big Tech and Wall Street's favorite "Republican" to the role of Speaker... Their last-ditch effort to bully me into voting McCarthy tells a different story. But I won't give in - no matter how much they treat my phone line like Kevin McCarthy treats K Street, I will NOT cave in to the Establishment's demands! | | == | | == | There is too much at stake for anything less than our 'A Team' right now, Peter. This is a moment to FIGHT, and Cavin' McCarthy's first instinct is FLIGHT! We need to be demanding investigations and impeachments for the pain the Regime has caused the American People. We need to be taking over Pelosi and Cheney's UnSelect Witch Hunt Committee and using it to expose the FEDSURRECTION. We need to be cutting off every last one of your tax dollars that is blindly being funneled to the Ukraine gravy train! These are important fights, Peter, in which we can't afford anything less than our most assertive leadership possible. The Swamp "Republicans" know where I stand on this, and they're BEGGING me to have a change of heart. Help me show them that MAGA patriots will not be backing down one inch. == | | == | Thanks for not backing down, | == | Matt Gaetz, Republican-FL | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Caroline Colarusso for Congress
subject: Charter School Open Season
body:
Download Your Lottery Application
| | | |
---
| Charter School in Malden Seeking Kindergarten Students from Stoneham, Melrose, Wakefield and Woburn.
---
| [BEGIN ONLINE APPLICATION CLICK HERE - DEADLINE JAN. 6th](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSee2Qp3qM13nVTM1BsqK0R2nSezOqn6V2n7Czr_jTHRicdOYDG8AaQtFEBVg0s7lwag-TgnDTQcdBgP2jiBK4xgIEkOUTc4oU2cOAregue2_AaWYYGwuwr5KuMGpERxIsZw1EOp8iDYRxn-0_BeWp5Z5Qy6gw2t8ZBlfQIz7rkcDCFpewfQfWwXYGdmJHP_xVajHvtXEP5l0rGGFnreG5gZIAwiuyz_YKv-j6e4R_iz7i1SvcWrCwEm2qO_8ASUGdg_EHUPXPyI2SB4MWp6H9DGmC-Zaajrji8rKub1eiFo-juCDhD0vix3RXv-7-7PC3FSBq_CP1mgjWov5T3jV2f37w2MJAT7&c=E_4x_n5KVVn8tg1rc6LODgOWK3Yw44asJA2l3-PGYaljbYNooiHYRw==&ch=5WkAxtN4P9JUfMyp88mbHDjIn5xPra4TFwNltTY5wI_2Xkzibu62AA==)
---
Friends,
If you are looking for an alternative to the indoctrination many of us are seeing in some government schools, please consider the charter school option. Please read the information below. Feel free to share with friends, neighbors and family. See the flyer below.
Thank You, Caroline
---
---
Summary of Mystic Valley
Mystic Valley is a public charter school located in Malden Massachusetts. The school serves more than 1,600 students in grades K-12 on four campuses in Malden: Kindergarten at 576 Eastern Avenue; the lower school (1-8) at 770 Salem Street and the high school (9-12) at 238 and 306 Highland Avenue. The school draws students primarily from the cities of: Everett, Malden, Medford, Melrose, Stoneham and Wakefield. The school has adopted the extended day and extended school year model in which classes go from 8:00 to 3:30 each day of a 200 day school year.
What is a Charter School?
Charter schools are tuition-free public schools of choice financed through local, state, and federal funds which are operated independently of local school boards. Each charter school has its own unique mission that reflects the vison of the school's founders. Charter schools are fully accountable, must meet the educational needs of their students, and must achieve the goals laid out in their charter.
What makes Mystic Valley unique?
Mystic Valley provides equitable opportunities for all students to acquire a world-class education. Mystic Valley believes that schools should focus on what all Americans, and what all human beings, have in common, rather than focusing on what sets us apart. Parents and students can expect a rigorous academic program, a safe and secure campus, a strong Code of Values, and dedicated, enthusiastic teachers committed to providing the best possible learning environment for our students. Students wear a school uniform and are in attendance for 200 days of instruction. The school day is from 8:00 a.m.-3:30 p.m. and includes compulsory Spanish language and Character Education programs.
A rigorous and proven educational program
Great teachers and proven curricula are the keys to student success at Mystic Valley. Students in our elementary program are taught Language Arts and Reading through Direct Instruction and Mathematics using the Saxon K-8 Math Series. The science and history/geography curricula follow the Core Knowledge Sequence developed by the eminent educator and author, Dr. E. D. Hirsch. In the High School, the course of study prepares students for the International Baccalaureate (IB) program. Critical to successful implementation of our program is grade level planning done in teams. All courses are aligned with the Massachusetts Curriculum Frameworks and standards.
Mission Statement
The Mission of the Mystic Valley Regional Charter School is to provide the opportunity of a world class education characterized by a well-mannered, disciplined and structured academic climate. Central to Mystic Valley's academic environment is the incorporation of selected core virtues and the fundamental ideals of our American Culture, which are embodied in the Declaration of Independence and the United States Constitution.
Direct Instruction
Direct Instruction (DI) is a research-based model for teaching that emphasizes well-developed, clearly designed lessons presented in small learning increments. The key beliefs of DI are that teachers are responsible for student learning and that curriculum design is a key factor in student achievement. DI is a highly structured teaching method which features a well-sequenced plan of instruction for reading and language. As DI is based on the mastery learning philosophy, students are grouped and advanced according to their individual abilities and progress.
Core Knowledge
The Core Knowledge Sequence at Mystic Valley is a detailed outline of specific content in English language arts, math, science, history/geography, music, and art. It provides a coherent foundation of learning while allowing teachers the flexibility to meet student needs. Core Knowledge is incremental in its philosophy, designed to encourage steady growth in student knowledge and skills throughout the K-8 years. Mystic Valley is one of less than a hundred officially certified Core Knowledge Schools in the nation and one of a handful of schools to be designated as a Core Knowledge Visitation School.
The International Baccalaureate
Mystic Valley was the first public school in the Boston area to be authorized by the International Baccalaureate Organization to offer the IB Diploma Program . The International Baccalaureate Organization (IBO) is a nonprofit educational foundation, which grew out of efforts to establish a common curriculum and a university entry credential that are recognized worldwide. The IBO offers the prestigious IB Diploma for the final two years of secondary education and is known throughout the world as one of the most outstanding university preparation programs. The IB places an emphasis on analytical thinking and writing skills and features a demanding curriculum with a global focus.
NONDISCRIMINATION POLICY
State and federal laws prohibit discrimination in education. Mystic Valley Regional Charter School does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, age, sex, gender identity, homelessness, religion, national origin, disability or sexual orientation with regard to admission, access to programs or activities, or employment opportunities. The school annually evaluates all aspects of our K-12 program to ensure that all students have equal access.

---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso for Congress | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e4d0f23d63041518e0a8c7b5a5d14c0&_e=0WkspnXn_ocXHh0PwpmhTPHPwkPXsVBzN-RfbxJEAZCnbikG5JzR0m0pXByf1Zj5F57gvCQdaRJ7WkhQL7jsUF7xquf8itkDiaDi4oCH5HRCmQJxxBwu2YKnjFedKBl_uNaqBUa8jcZ6mMWSdQHT5KoRJPF1_aKeRVTXJPhJsXZtHdYCafmqgFGo24o2l9wh381A152wHhlA1Vzi-fZkqdAO0XiyVgT-W9qSfsQc2gkkDX5uu3I_g85R8WYga1_MWo8HTJVZzj7qyqpSLpty8XAjXq0lCfmvvaSGGf1_ycJaCdy5BWP8AKHMbWvMEc3XKX295Tjaa5lttDHL-vo9mjDbKMGLA23nxwrjUK5wxu6oMFjYppAe5Jb_1MgHBXJayyxoJ4BszLnuh864jMjHwDTo6oHR82TfsNf5I37GcgMUMQl2B-usjk2T8IeBoXQF)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e4d0f23d63041518e0a8c7b5a5d14c0&_e=0WkspnXn_ocXHh0PwpmhTPHPwkPXsVBzN-RfbxJEAZCnbikG5JzR0m0pXByf1Zj5F57gvCQdaRJ7WkhQL7jsUF7xquf8itkDiaDi4oCH5HRCmQJxxBwu2YKnjFedKBl_uNaqBUa8jcZ6mMWSdQHT5KoRJPF1_aKeRVTXJPhJsXZtHdYCafmqgFGo24o2l9wh381A152wHhlA1Vzi-fZkqdAO0XiyVgT-W9qSfsQc2gkkDX5uu3I_g85R8WYga1_MWo8HTJVZzj7qyqpSLpty8QefYJkcM6Myf5ANWDi_dRdv9Vj4Lh_Upc38cJGr6xssqgcKMY3kptovT9k8FPPQ9nw7SW1q3AlrcI6OWHbSEuptxOy5uqwB0l2mB3TpYcdZZA8MaCcYa8tvWm2nsq55GC-UMrNvWSiV5eHBVXVXLRB4MELWICvLW-VWjU4vAeE3)” which you can now own on DVD.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e4d0f23d63041518e0a8c7b5a5d14c0&_e=0WkspnXn_ocXHh0PwpmhTPHPwkPXsVBzN-RfbxJEAZCnbikG5JzR0m0pXByf1Zj5F57gvCQdaRJ7WkhQL7jsUF7xquf8itkDiaDi4oCH5HRCmQJxxBwu2YKnjFedKBl_uNaqBUa8jcZ6mMWSdQHT5KoRJPF1_aKeRVTXJPhJsXZtHdYCafmqgFGo24o2l9wh381A152wHhlA1Vzi-fZkqdAO0XiyVgT-W9qSfsQc2gkkDX5uu3I_g85R8WYga1_MWo8HTJVZzj7qyqpSLpty8bYg8zAXD5WLFscvzTFhhG3Gboa25Udy2AMlJ4JmZDLi_UEHhiaaehBeMM2am7GsiPlwxkUgsDTrwtz6iUG1cR3Fbk5cbZ0yZWz7V30pksZuBmqdntZ1-_xcNKkzthXfhoO8U3ibko5Mn8yXvcUKS3NXYl9P_aFVGwdanovihl6w)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e4d0f23d63041518e0a8c7b5a5d14c0&_e=0WkspnXn_ocXHh0PwpmhTPHPwkPXsVBzN-RfbxJEAZCnbikG5JzR0m0pXByf1Zj5F57gvCQdaRJ7WkhQL7jsUF7xquf8itkDiaDi4oCH5HRCmQJxxBwu2YKnjFedKBl_uNaqBUa8jcZ6mMWSdQHT5KoRJPF1_aKeRVTXJPhJsXZtHdYCafmqgFGo24o2l9wh381A152wHhlA1Vzi-fZkqdAO0XiyVgT-W9qSfsQc2gkkDX5uu3I_g85R8WYga1_MWo8HTJVZzj7qyqpSLpty8WiFDCmz19uqAzvkMgkXxvSJ5ivshbDfL8BesZKsestVletz8oo8610QxAQHwKTwOGeVIcvoVTlnPkjm-frmTycliM09hWVXCQHgM55_wjRHB4KFpB3fkWmiTojCG1m1V9r95W6pgjXffbucqiDspdZGrk2uVSivovreSe8Cq5gv).

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79858828416642fe8c16ed14da5a7f78&_e=15D4DsW1F3AcpT7zMC-EydnPuWJaECM5N0QjYkQxMRsDblP7kM0mIRa-aIuXVfcdWRDmoRKFvNbhtJlqli8HLznfTgP09wmravHUGGj4fPPqDBJR-hxm7OBAMiVwkSO8RBm435LrpSA3BV1hctdDpgkvIm9RKvUuP3EPFGnVFH4MnmJd5jngo7YITRlHC4qOd5aEMLHAwfgV57l04zQxAvcKrXx5kDT6Hc7WVjk0MV3OkcgN0PSjCReQFyJ5IPzg_A8BfYTGkIgpPmAFYUHm0C3o4vAAWw24afVhx7mc3QE%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ae42caf1de4ef880449ff1b73af12a&_e=O_d5SEBIBLyrVAnh7DT5bASJhbzt15Tv0jhp_S-9wT1w8lmO9lBGOvy4RYeUnoWobIYLMUOmvtJJFlzTjoSrLuwREeTjJAEW9hWXsIlSBh9I0afD8yWUro9YMTrUUXnk1PPFHCnj7Nlp8Kpx39jfxqBL8OmWYGzQfzXUwggnl0KqndIewUDPQtZZHvMwXQZZCF69qxow3gxyiu7RqYMOgNLvGhtLhnACGCqSzo8WyYvP2VjnpsBJQpuY8rfg84wHqXz0lWaoOOKw7PrZ9vSejCSO-mxs500TwdqvRwyP8r8pdM58S71h-9JsIYLWizaX2mr8bVJ2pYuDWV4zh6POdONQkj9PwLyA697421joRJl1UevJCQJBr0XCzL_LIyIFDSSCa00darWL5FFjR-IDSQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ae42caf1de4ef880449ff1b73af12a&_e=O_d5SEBIBLyrVAnh7DT5bASJhbzt15Tv0jhp_S-9wT1w8lmO9lBGOvy4RYeUnoWobIYLMUOmvtJJFlzTjoSrLuwREeTjJAEW9hWXsIlSBh9I0afD8yWUro9YMTrUUXnk1PPFHCnj7Nlp8Kpx39jfxqBL8OmWYGzQfzXUwggnl0KqndIewUDPQtZZHvMwXQZZCF69qxow3gxyiu7RqYMOgNLvGhtLhnACGCqSzo8WyYvP2VjnpsBJQpuY8rfg84wHyM0kqwQun6UzrWbJIv_PlOCRUPr1KanomhTg4wpEkXyOwk1EaWAV87JaEujb0Pl9CtPphYfgL0v6AmN4huA2GUDO7fIX9FJeEafxCND4Z2HoxAKkspP_QCqI31e_LUb5geJhwGtmYa4TebP_QfWblw%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ae42caf1de4ef880449ff1b73af12a&_e=O_d5SEBIBLyrVAnh7DT5bASJhbzt15Tv0jhp_S-9wT1w8lmO9lBGOvy4RYeUnoWobIYLMUOmvtJJFlzTjoSrLuwREeTjJAEW9hWXsIlSBh9I0afD8yWUro9YMTrUUXnk1PPFHCnj7Nlp8Kpx39jfxqBL8OmWYGzQfzXUwggnl0KqndIewUDPQtZZHvMwXQZZCF69qxow3gxyiu7RqYMOgNLvGhtLhnACGCqSzo8WyYvP2VjnpsBJQpuY8rfg84wHAl5G8E1p3mCc_J6ezQ6jkDJCMqVc1hQe7xnrXVxVbFU2bfeOB492mwiXXdIVJpRm-Wr1Ia77jPu_sosrN-UqCOvy6y1UsxQeEEX6iVOs6Rq391WQ40LB-rOT_szjmmrTtUNxDNuXKDpHSaWzWxrLfQ%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Is there hope for America?
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6840c11259aa46d2ba1c9d720d7aff65&_e=U7v5XtqADxyLTaiJsxsLAqbMjoUP3ZAUWD6GRuyOVo2Br_mwviiIpqsrLTbUgT_T9ggq0VKXGcWmBk1CcWaXwyzWKome84IWQOe-gtHr63oyan8Uy8CvsUzCW_ZlFbEw8rdmlWdalIs6SgRCtATTB8bgsPkGoPNgvoRvJLibtA0phA_RAQ9j0gkSV4ZQuZl1tHyeRs5Yl4D8df_M04zzkHNR5AfsMyJ7wwKcOttr6tacThAY-gQuGwsYGZiODPYjumbpJNiE-2nDoU4wx4wPKzkdyimbgdZvPnOyhimGVwRW1EnGMBXw5rCTXRWUzROW580jxKwSTg6jRR7wKTwJ7XlR-LnGym3T0_b_L-lejiqK1IqhmCts489X4Akxp3fKONL5xX6wjbebFAXb_gH22g%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn't even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_" I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth--that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that 'except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.'"_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God's blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today's governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6840c11259aa46d2ba1c9d720d7aff65&_e=U7v5XtqADxyLTaiJsxsLAqbMjoUP3ZAUWD6GRuyOVo2Br_mwviiIpqsrLTbUgT_T9ggq0VKXGcWmBk1CcWaXwyzWKome84IWQOe-gtHr63oyan8Uy8CvsUzCW_ZlFbEw8rdmlWdalIs6SgRCtATTB8bgsPkGoPNgvoRvJLibtA0phA_RAQ9j0gkSV4ZQuZl1tHyeRs5Yl4D8df_M04zzkHNR5AfsMyJ7wwKcOttr6tacThAY-gQuGwsYGZiODPYj_qgYAbdg7_JTj5j5baZlISnCMWVvgN8eOEwuY1SLWALsXfVEN9TbLb1QjJymPgQQ1-RhBUq-J9ij54t5FrFSXWqmprkxmvSbOtuubf3IenVmsyllKsvE3iVzJWKXNzLuvw0YWfLnD57AV5RcU3-59g%3D%3D)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who "governs the affairs of men" and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We've pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms--and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What's the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God's Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6840c11259aa46d2ba1c9d720d7aff65&_e=U7v5XtqADxyLTaiJsxsLAqbMjoUP3ZAUWD6GRuyOVo2Br_mwviiIpqsrLTbUgT_T9ggq0VKXGcWmBk1CcWaXwyzWKome84IWQOe-gtHr63oyan8Uy8CvsUzCW_ZlFbEw8rdmlWdalIs6SgRCtATTB8bgsPkGoPNgvoRvJLibtA0phA_RAQ9j0gkSV4ZQuZl1tHyeRs5Yl4D8df_M04zzkHNR5AfsMyJ7wwKcOttr6tacThAY-gQuGwsYGZiODPYjx0Cf4Wrm49hH051qDCNgm4f372jimZ_OyY3CBv5k-hl3blPAq_jMrJe8wl_mcELFPR2edFUaRyLB9w13596-D9HwkNA8Q-2B268sE8bor0N9cwIu3Muduu-N9T_hu4vKvRqpw8mWfMcBV5TDFUQuAA%3D%3D)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6840c11259aa46d2ba1c9d720d7aff65&_e=U7v5XtqADxyLTaiJsxsLAqbMjoUP3ZAUWD6GRuyOVo2Br_mwviiIpqsrLTbUgT_T9ggq0VKXGcWmBk1CcWaXwyzWKome84IWQOe-gtHr63oyan8Uy8CvsUzCW_ZlFbEw8rdmlWdalIs6SgRCtATTB8bgsPkGoPNgvoRvJLibtA0phA_RAQ9j0gkSV4ZQuZl1tHyeRs5Yl4D8df_M04zzkHNR5AfsMyJ7wwKcOttr6tacThAY-gQuGwsYGZiODPYjHkwGyaiZH7oezX3nPFXuWgFZRB_Y0xyNW9VRdchx7F0qnkpkDUEneoCpWrOYb1Zq3IFRZA8XWlBpNbiLw5bKKzUWHlMjhCP-2WQn88qPptj938gqn6kanS-aJMgIOaqst3n-qLZyLctzejX5UqBbaQ%3D%3D)** There is hope for the future of America--and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

clean_body: | | | Hello, Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn't even a Christian. He was a Deist: " I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth--that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that 'except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.'" In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God's blessing in an opening prayer at every session! When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today's governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted. | | As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who "governs the affairs of men" and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us: Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year. As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens. Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age. We've pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms--and we are reaping the consequences. What's the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God's Word. If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of Pathway to Victory , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. There is hope for the future of America--and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: I'm so thrilled to share this moment with you
body:
I can't help but smile today. That's because President Biden just signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law!
| | |
---
Derek,

**I can't help but smile today. That's because President Biden just signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law!**

After years of efforts, advocacy, and activism by the LGBTQ community and its allies, as well as a string of supportive court rulings, being able to marry the person you love is now federally protected.
Personally, this is particularly joyful, because my daughter Molly and her wife were able to be there to usher in this momentous victory. Here is a photo of the three of us!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56045820/383684856/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk779-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzZiNTNiOC01YTdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XGSvYIZK3HdF7JxPVS9N3t01SvHfZGrBc9AYPC2kGQ=)
It was truly an exhilarating day for all of us, especially because earlier this year, I was able to watch my daughter marry the love of her life in our backyard in Chester County. As you can imagine, it was a joyous day for our whole family.
Before I even decided to serve my community in Congress, I've been committed to fighting for the LGBTQ community. So, I am so proud that my colleagues and I were finally able to get this important legislation passed. I know how much this means to families and their loved ones across the country. As always, I will continue fighting in the upcoming congressional term, building a better future for all of us.

There is work to be done.

Chrissy

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Elon Musk bought a crime scene
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086560:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)
Peter,

Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right.

Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections.

He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society.

This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through **Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. **

And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk.

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption.

[_**MRC is raising $15,000 before the New Year, and I need your help. Can you donate any amount today? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086560:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)

Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information:
* Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the **Twitter Files** -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files.

* Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the **Twitter File** s, then **delayed** the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan.

* Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker.

Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations.

[_**Can you send your urgent donation to MRC and help us defeat Big Tech censors? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086560:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)

How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media?

MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship.

**Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. **

MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Peter, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month?

**Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086561:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086563:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086564:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086565:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086566:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086567:J6Ye8GGHN:m:1:3334294963:213B13491D5F9BD733592453BA77D814:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell

This is just the beginning. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7531%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Ki5m5NRzo5%2bRRAM8PtEs0w&sysid=1)

---
Our sacred vote was trampled on. Every American should be furious, regardless of party. Illegal ballots were counted in Maricopa County, and Republicans were turned away at the polls.

It was a total **DISASTER**.

My team has filed one of the strongest Election Lawsuits in history. We will get **ANSWERS**.

Don’t let the Fake News spin their lies. [**We must keep fighting if we hope to save Arizona and this nation.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97910%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YJJRxFOe61%2f4k0AgtsfFWA&sysid=1)

Conservatives will NEVER win unless we keep on the pressure.

The fear-mongering and smear campaigns of the Fake News media won’t stop me from exposing this election. Asking questions isn’t “dangerous,” and our comprehensive lawsuit proves that not everything was as it seemed in Arizona.

[**I won’t stop fighting until we’ve got answers, but I can’t keep fighting unless I have your support.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97911%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yw9W2QZPV4bNzm7jPTdMFA&sysid=1)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3363a1b1f1a2455e8128a64c449fbf31&_e=ZT2L1ipK8FN0clMA8dWakdjSNUbV8r0vZ0PdEkJLtWkUtkyUQN3y4K9Xgifby22suf0Jae1U5NyRXMijXLjLu_wuVASlsIbBSV5yfTV3Bii-eGLKba1-BW3GSyCm2bxjSCnt0_4Q8cmGPC2YNoQ9ToFQvrvrGc19RSXVuSCX6uF5BbSgNJfv9m81LAjrvC5S42DM2oGob4BpdbHwVJje23vizQm15wdri1TzBMUUsj9NNgfaSpuvzNxdDguW2BG8T6GLFmgKHp8KP6zGXlfxAfh0EVt204R2tfAmubcg0uIPY8sUzUvF0bTOpEcy4n402NdSdBGeLcsRgCkObxXM8baqmIcyJne0Plvqkkod1hW8ePHb8nIfTV7gLh_7Cy3DzTm9jAca5c61aUUdDVSJJA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3363a1b1f1a2455e8128a64c449fbf31&_e=ZT2L1ipK8FN0clMA8dWakdjSNUbV8r0vZ0PdEkJLtWkUtkyUQN3y4K9Xgifby22suf0Jae1U5NyRXMijXLjLu_wuVASlsIbBSV5yfTV3Bii-eGLKba1-BW3GSyCm2bxjSCnt0_4Q8cmGPC2YNoQ9ToFQvrvrGc19RSXVuSCX6uF5BbSgNJfv9m81LAjrvC5S42DM2oGob4BpdbHwVJje23vizQm15wdri1TzBMUUsj9NNgfaSpuvzNxdDguW2BG87Rw6RSoINF5CpscFMGuEmusS5JPt1bpYAfhp7PWeu3sMuxdIjfqaUG81UTl4FhcvNK5j1D0UKTu-azDONP6WpxsiemUaRqlydfeeWHPN7UIJL79PhFTGc2uQ46QJvdZfVblT-M5UorfXU216tZGD_A%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3363a1b1f1a2455e8128a64c449fbf31&_e=ZT2L1ipK8FN0clMA8dWakdjSNUbV8r0vZ0PdEkJLtWkUtkyUQN3y4K9Xgifby22suf0Jae1U5NyRXMijXLjLu_wuVASlsIbBSV5yfTV3Bii-eGLKba1-BW3GSyCm2bxjSCnt0_4Q8cmGPC2YNoQ9ToFQvrvrGc19RSXVuSCX6uF5BbSgNJfv9m81LAjrvC5S42DM2oGob4BpdbHwVJje23vizQm15wdri1TzBMUUsj9NNgfaSpuvzNxdDguW2BG8J7S5FZlFw31DPUR1rudrdp0ykW8Kw8c4gEP7e0wLs29qB2DAJfI2_d0a2Xr4mBI67n7kazk9urBgVzWiqXrxzTRO9_jPQtCBKmesXhZBCzmahBG8uJTS1l0D1kixgTtycFD35rz14oeXkaGhkFzPYA%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The Federalist Papers ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. " The Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of " The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of " The Federalist Papers" today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJxXE4D3yC6pniVB1zr-UleQS4dcuxWGobLNY_CcJsvMxiczFTjAzi2vj8WXQS8s8qsZQwab3HzJ8SIKICA_ZWbfJh7viFslcG1r3bMlWWD1s-46jX8gUHXMppowFTxwLSugDGDSRyp7ZalYI44nSH1M%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJ86F2Xdw8B91J0Zb4z4xaA6aMy32HoeUNeqkLsNfmyZDewLW-Q1jrkrQMadvrgBHydnzSJ-_Mt_D6yVhy_blbgPC4iugB8Oxh6Ncbv3ZefUKgY4G5C6kMjRDdtHEbCT5VgLud6ZL4cxQvUFcM1xXIio%3D)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJ3i72Kr-sFflmUqyE6WsATsi_I1ztPOc9Z91dZZLvoTJcwJ90sTS2r3exabufEYp7tf0oR62ZQZUltRLOxFHkFqh-DEMWqND5TwEFdluXO5TQhdhqLqzBIjjjfEj4TfSgx8yqR0gB06Q390I6fTxYMM%3D)
---
[Get my book](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJ7Sa8ONyUokCpSsUPpFszIa8JPEEBiO6dFMcz4za0jVuB1ivgGypyGc_gQse7NlRy34ip3UTamcN0G4zIrASyTBghoEn-jyNEjvlDbWZu4hBmU_zs5TFnQb1KstX3IW03PayZ-V5jprZhjp9BhQpGUw%3D)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJz_MAOsK-CHnGKia1OnbKGy3MHk2-5VaV9KM8te6S3u2OllBl0R2TOgu8fiLuI6920h1a4gSM64iQmi5WJe3v5Gi2xeQGx20S7eA4AewsZPNPfnNmDg1u8MJr0pVt0kLn01CpFElNqSBWLx_7OD3KGQ%3D) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJ2NuUreD928mbXh3oNmiDnGHygLyVYrVMOJUJylIoBW1UXxXAoPX9Sxc88k5jR2fagGdFDyAnAVhgnrqRjIDU6XCZENkVoH9iamN-4-ZsgBwOXc1tZCdOJPr-4k8X0oOAPTdA9oVHsWCNTM1lbC2i00%3D)
---
[Get my book](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJ6Nl3ORmEDwas7-aOvZHvnot261C0V1cmgsH-YkCFo2wLufO1Hkk4-f4nJQpghFMLPn0itCDCHGjWvIZEKRJ6vHYRH-3vg96ZCooOhkwLGGzRWhaFsYh-Qv4eVRTNVMgi6EHm6i0FWZyWt29v0_JSXE%3D)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJzi03dpT44xqMifzVxyEwkgjGn8V6Pk0n6Hbadf0_065h8WTHwMpKt-k8qtV17kBjzdyr8OOWL3ZBVyFjdOj7FmRJgrgeZsrmzu79PUcuWldQsSD7-4Xs5tE1MKbW2uSG9mvVM-D3BTj5gxRUQp8JO8%3D)
---
| | [Get my book ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5de230773604b4a900e69853a8f41e8&_e=LSXMTqa46b6nfOTsDCd3CRkGW4KWHd28f1WvFwoEuorfTfHwgkDCD08aOT0rJjtcTlMGQhb4ceZd1Pttsdcm3_y-8PJ6gzDoJOio5RnbGDXzh8YhqFLswkxMb2CERMp1qq0N0ubQnauA9HA3rOpcJ_vJmHPd57bWK8qDzkxkk78Mn5nQ5jxjSqRT-kA5xbHvCm8iDYYL0Eedbmmnyj_uxyJb7xRTZghPw2Yd2y1-OdH1vQu6-ZKtcJsKz5tDDkhlzVbMpMMFKG1_f6piXfRLrTktT_6KYFQ7KgxV8TD3iFIQuvO5BR0WlUkHhwksrIRu)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema betrayed these people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, In the week since Kyrsten Sinema announced she was leaving the Democratic Party, one thing has become clear: it’s a slap in the face to everyone who voted for, volunteered for, and donated to Sinema. This week Nathan Kohrman, who worked as a field organizer to help elect Sinema in 2018, wrote a story in The Atlantic revealing anger and disappointment amongst former Sinema campaign volunteers. “What they cannot forgive is the feeling that Sinema was not straight with them.” [**Arizona deserves better – we WILL replace Sinema in 2024. Chip in now >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcHQx7cGLePCm1XAcNWMuNTx3SEg-gNVMHQuWYbXpBA3uzPD1bN8hzthR9lcbSGHnf9ZlHAufD7yK5mg_ac48ovzgJQYNKPU62KskMk0GzzotaJAPjppsEmLc6U-dXxl9hw4v_WNLFL1Wq-coeVEKeZppolzWENX5PUnTSR60SNohU2nspqxYtYoYI3wZtfSWd9v-d7g9N1439Htk3OiwlaOy8eiVcNPET9RhtMFLwwVAy2w10OuysJKUcOfQsDa--iXEyw0kfFYbvTqpQ5E2lpCgrMq1p07gdS08SDzs-0rE/3s1/-IzaTIaxQYqcB6FkYxl2HQ/h0/rbIgehDfW13i8KhylaRv6_HuE6Gps0UwAGRTHI8j_uc) Here’s what a few of Sinema’s former volunteers told Nathan:
* Ana Doan, a retired teacher: “She made an idiot out of me, and I made an idiot out of all the people I spoke to.”
* Devina Alvarado, a Costco forklift driver: “Alvarado couldn't believe it when Sinema said she thought protecting the filibuster was essential to protecting women’s rights.” ... “I for sure look forward to canvassing for her opponent.”
* Michael, who had been formerly homeless: “Michael felt betrayed in March of 2021, when Sinema voted against raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour.”

The bottom line is it doesn’t matter what party Sinema identifies with: Sinema has always cared only about herself and own political ambition. That means abandoning the people who helped elect her, and it also means putting corporate interests like Wall Street and billionaire donors above her constituents. That’s why we’re going to do everything we possibly can to make sure she’s replaced with a Democrat who will actually listen to voters, not their corporate donors. [**Chip in now to help make it happen >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcHQx7cGLePCm1XAcNWMuNTwqBQat7LFaTeZgilkeZl_mZ7D0VGbXXj3p8D26CMNP5o47EQQlM9SLTVe8hjP5H6l7eT9tKfD9182fZg9tIeXpfCV8MYtvJrpCdjZRrpC27YpaLpiowODsFh5aokU1sLdZn0vG8fR-PL9N8xUkNzxL2NpvfvxKw8i-8rdx2Sm1ipK1UNqYJ-eZcnSmDtG24u2W29zaV0VNedROwnvYkSHPmRwXId0A09znfDTR2u3zkiXUOspwj2uyYIpKggTDj60JaOky9NYG99aAK4gwwd80/3s1/-IzaTIaxQYqcB6FkYxl2HQ/h1/AAbd8jkx6uHFTmFnyVcnXNfXuWxhY3h0JysMNh3YEyk) [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcu0qHXyk6I9P25moR6duy8hX9l-6RQFoW_WRzt2kCdoE_IK-1HD8g1Vept2cgb5cyn9S7T8ryrVVvdskl-fORmxVjiRn5VpHqyR7OM-R5UylAR0FKL9cYmUdlRC26GdqdqeCORswRbgNAZIMbbhl977Rw_p5s5mPxNcNlZrjuxD5CIzjk4LwY1ZVRDbuSd2qSpmn084KO1r6a5WXvUMpXECF1guAKbJaTXCjSzT1XWv_MLgshLwJugJCm6VtAf_Y-YRAjP5Qc0qPIxfP49o7gTWYL389YTRmlLlLPwCkPrTE/3s1/-IzaTIaxQYqcB6FkYxl2HQ/h2/UogQYBZcGEjGe0RwXY87q6fQnZTLbXDyKC_DfLrpnXg) Thanks for helping Arizona, -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

body:
In his latest attempt to lay the groundwork for a 15-week abortion ban, Youngkin sets aside money to lock up women and doctors

|

name: Eric
subject: Love always wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Hey team,

Fantastic news: the Respect For Marriage Act is now law! This historic bill marks a huge step forward for protecting all Americans' right to marry who they love, no matter how they identify. Love always wins, and today it has scored one of its biggest wins yet.

I have always been so proud to be a part of the fight for progress on civil rights every step of the way, whether it’s voting to assure marriage equality, standing up for abortion rights, working toward greater racial equity, and more. But the fight for LGBTQ+ equality does not stop at the Respect For Marriage Act.

MAGA Republicans’ brazen attacks on the LGBTQ+ community around the country are ongoing, and we have to fight back. Not only did a hefty majority of the GOP vote against marriage equality, but they are also trying to ban all discussion of LGBTQ+ topics in school and are inspiring hateful attacks against LGBTQ+ people and their safe spaces.

Passing this bill was a crucial victory, but we have to keep up the momentum in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. Can you sign our pledge and commit to joining me in defending civil rights against MAGA Republicans’ attacks? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WX9zJ5xQV0mxblgi3OiS_g2]

PLEDGE TO DEFEND CIVIL RIGHTS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WX9zJ5xQV0mxblgi3OiS_g2]

Thank you so much for standing beside me in the fight for equality, team. Let’s keep this up.

— Eric

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: End child mutilation now
body:
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child's leg to cure appendicitis. _Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her "bravery" and for giving your child the body he or she was "always meant to have." I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it 's not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl - Chloe Cole - after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. **I need your help to fund this legal battle.** [**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=029045e9bb0e40139d08d35ed3ea8c7f&_e=2FYuoKUusu5YXcgLDTENgsnFfjls6n5Pp-BCabfY-rNIEIPS2-B6LfMZF7JCIhRppzCQyiaMebQb39qd0IxfHna3zkoONhp7RkOWdLRVb4HM4LOAgvcHHbWZSc5AT6Tfqe7Tv772hvS7RxT9qFpjCDrUurh4PSq008y1rpElobVrFzYy65pEkko55rgnR1tINdBlKMMHnoHPiAI2aJreKnSwoEd5BvHC-X4CBe69ak7-TvgnexXUo90cqAqq1NfK0r1z_AwWOujteccLrGEDsa9qA-PbLMbOlBwz4rUmtId2YBba-eComKwZr1hN1CcxmaLIZ9D5N3Msp5JEPQ5_WA5nbofdhk4Kmjn79XdxHOjeTQaPUr5m_oxSXwoyCrtqT7I3UI1uJjUWcfsQnv_Obljvn6EUthG9URo4I4MlnB0%3D) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to "transition" her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical "professionals" coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering "treatment." **Doctors told her parents they could either have a "dead daughter or a living son."** Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical "professionals" pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. **Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it's time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I'm helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we're suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman--and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won't be easily won - we're facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you 're in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=029045e9bb0e40139d08d35ed3ea8c7f&_e=2FYuoKUusu5YXcgLDTENgsnFfjls6n5Pp-BCabfY-rNIEIPS2-B6LfMZF7JCIhRppzCQyiaMebQb39qd0IxfHna3zkoONhp7RkOWdLRVb4HM4LOAgvcHHbWZSc5AT6Tfqe7Tv772hvS7RxT9qFpjCDrUurh4PSq008y1rpElobVrFzYy65pEkko55rgnR1tINdBlKMMHnoHPiAI2aJreKnSwoEd5BvHC-X4CBe69ak7-TvgnexXUo90cqAqq1NfKkxz1iE9DP-zWVaMVV1oUgoOZIryE-WNDZ_d5Si5K9bSkT3Y70jc_jY650jG-HeqbZrE5RScc1qEzoghq_Z3ynwT50AGG1oJFuViqevOEZ8X2Ngwebv1jIj6EPIKpg-4SncGNLc6-fPRd_KBMSFm_TKbKdLMg--gx7QeU0dOCPuM%3D) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical "professionals" have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight--likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. clean_body: | | | | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child's leg to cure appendicitis. Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her "bravery" and for giving your child the body he or she was "always meant to have." I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. Except it 's not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria. The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl - Chloe Cole - after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. I need your help to fund this legal battle. Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to "transition" her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical "professionals" coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering "treatment." Doctors told her parents they could either have a "dead daughter or a living son." Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself. We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical "professionals" pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave herLupon Depot to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her. And it's time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I'm helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we're suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman--and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won't be easily won - we're facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported $8 billion profit in 2021 alone. These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical "professionals" have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight--likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. If we don't fight back now and hold these medical "professionals" accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can't allow that. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Is there hope for America?
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wa
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8h4msse51guc2itn3v72rklcigkj701qv6s6geo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6aob4c5h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_“I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’”_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo29jbqr342nv2aeujcktf5cedlddttq4fdela90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6aob4c5h2bs)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zouiufnt639e65r83i6377f1634aie5c6cjkdlb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6aob4c5h2bs)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu4hcf7keg63q25iqbtierbo2lf8tmgoekeci6jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6aob4c5h2bs)** There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
