name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zioc8282ng6hkcv5k1fr35qkhn519nofpa5u161g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6ao31c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdhhgklp7sh3212eh9f31pk9dupcj274cljrh100_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6ao31c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8oeqvnc20t7usar2u1e9c1l5kmefuq3nf5trcl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6ao31c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Freedom First Project

body:

| Peter,

The 2022 election cycle may be over, but the fight to take back the House majority is already underway.

Republicans have made it clear that reproductive health access, action on climate change, and voting rights are all on the line. And as the “Red Wave” failed to materialize this year, you can bet they will be pulling out all the stops to keep the House and take back the Senate in 2024.

We can’t let that happen. name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8vr8jhtbqeod3h8d4upqoqa77q2bv1a5jlgscbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6eoj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5p4900ea9i2tbu6pvee0ro6srt51h9vleqape98_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6eoj2cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrcn3lfqmjjf6ftq7ho3lpartgos0qp87lqmt9ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9i6eoj2cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. body:
We asked a small group of trusted Patriots to submit their honest response to Steve Scalise’s Majority Leader Survey and the preliminary results are in... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0209%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sqyBtD2Hme%2f%2bYm%2fzH3rdZw&sysid=1)

Friend,
Hi, this is Sarah from GOP HQ. We asked a small group of trusted Patriots to submit their honest response to Steve Scalise’s Majority Leader Survey and the preliminary results are in...
\+ Most respondents support ENDING funding of Critical Race Theory in schools
\+ A huge majority of respondents support finishing the WALL at our southern border
The responses so far have been extremely important in guiding the agenda for the first weeks of the new Congress. **But we also got word that some folks had more to say.**

That's why we’ve updated the Majority Leader Survey to ask just a few more questions that will help Congressional leaders understand how to best serve you:
**[UPDATED] Majority Leader Survey** _** Only responses submitted before 11:59 PM will be accepted **_ **Do you support House Republicans investigating Big Tech?
** ****Do you support voter ID requirements to vote?
**** ******What should the top priority for House Republicans be?****** ********[SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43826%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fa6maETRR8Z0IZmHdsVQWg&sysid=1)**** ****
---
I know we’ve asked a lot of you and we appreciate all the time and effort you’ve given to provide insightful feedback. Please know that your responses go directly to help shape the playbook for the next Congressional session.
[******This is your direct line of communication with Congressional leaders.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43827%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m%2bQbzi2FU10TuxwMuVPjGA&sysid=1)
Thank you so much for you help,
Sarah
GOP HQ

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfbderch1tqv8l78dtma5imrmmkuod0gkhjhlnn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zht5mvnf9j7tf970ike9levlgk07o9i6an6o59t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1bc4it1lrob9us05no0m83kh3804u2242j1u0ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqta1b25o0pcl4tp1l7bs7ov5cq559uo9ag8jr5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziug859nbuolhm7vpgpvjmpq318m9neeg3pulvq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5s63jf1e5bg38figlfqmh07f0fussahai335ti0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztcuu23jb9lkfv3e3od1jkgo7nnraslpkgfrfgtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztkkt1esf9u43h8uths270amf1s86doggrs6jvn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z998avd6j81mrfig68d94riujj9huu906quafesg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpp3nn7iomu2215m0e9c127eckcd3d9lm9f53ctg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj28rj1jebk75rniefkqd7pb2d53gcltk2beag0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9b28h36j5l0192tq1e1qjri8uiuieft4la8qdl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4k4mcac6tmphh4vh6j5tccljss2tfvo1qfirifg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsb5bfhjvbqqv6jpaermg4lttmu4qqocuvkqekg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsrte32ic679mqhqsp8f07iq5i9iagvnapjbqkig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgssqb8iop8q8gsqtah0k4fnn5e6qpteeek16g80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf45ghc5oo773gm47k5vb1k0jg8m4m8tjcisfs58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziv2uvqd1lhfj47d4ej29fgoivoglh6emujj47ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ahphsadnit8rl50o842mcrrifsje3scaaticko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6h6ugqfc16ut4qkj71uufdl3tcptu18lsbkjr0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8u14nmp4cs594n75ha2pk13i3accsn4lmpgiui0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h68pr4clh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zg5all72gkn17p72s9gtebifntueb67gkfu7p83g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jason Miyares
subject: RE: freedom in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
The Democrats will spend big money to expand their narrow majority in the State Senate...| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=78a9b32a224649bc8ab9918f1b4fae0d&_e=MTTNy1vwRf9eoHdI-_A_0tbspVzTyRkd2Manoo39hGzXFN2I2Xt71S9sQdnX5Zb5K89Jo1oAzrElHsrWqBiJ0g7EubMJntngO4qhOmLWdBGiJO6nuW-cXM-oX93i3y4tqCYHA_3Y3lw7LmxBYDMseaODVqre0hJZUoG93ulL_NIL4LttBGxXgajzcX0zGcxSHd1D61Ro2AaUDsOZnEotZbCdzETnn4wLbJUa_P01KD857ATyV9-2QDhhF24cBdx4HL9GghuSGJ5ASLFfjoG10DIdsDtrBKlGFRwL0NE5epSCx6j1mpEkj_ZPcTbaqCoIR6fFTvgercRsif7Gbi1cXA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Because of conservative Virginians like you, we were successful in electing my friend Jen Kiggans to Congress! While I’m happy about Jen’s success, we still have more work to do, friend. In _a little less than a month_ , Virginians in the 7th Senate District will vote for someone to replace Jen in the Senate, which is why I want to know: _[**Friend, do you support Navy Veteran Kevin Adams for State Senate?**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=78a9b32a224649bc8ab9918f1b4fae0d&_e=MTTNy1vwRf9eoHdI-_A_0tbspVzTyRkd2Manoo39hGzXFN2I2Xt71S9sQdnX5Zb5K89Jo1oAzrElHsrWqBiJ0g7EubMJntngO4qhOmLWdBGiJO6nuW-cXM-oX93i3y4tqCYHA_3Y3lw7LmxBYDMseaODVqre0hJZUoG93ulL_NIL4LttBGxXgajzcX0zGcxSAF9QABof93yTinbMesgJuEfOVmCb0NsJeM87oOQoWEPmk195j9R5xViiIhuuaXgfKNoadQHfQTYCJmKBBPfbuwiGJMGCknQIO8mfbuuAL0llcdqnLJcaYjowSwMS4IBNqoTDil2GKVwNUaJebgR_FQ%3D%3D)_
---
| | Friend, the race for this seat was _incredibly close_ in 2019 when we won. Democrats know that and are likely to drop big money to win and further their narrow majority in the Senate. _[**Please, let me know if you support Kevin Adams for State Senate.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=78a9b32a224649bc8ab9918f1b4fae0d&_e=MTTNy1vwRf9eoHdI-_A_0tbspVzTyRkd2Manoo39hGzXFN2I2Xt71S9sQdnX5Zb5K89Jo1oAzrElHsrWqBiJ0g7EubMJntngO4qhOmLWdBGiJO6nuW-cXM-oX93i3y4tqCYHA_3Y3lw7LmxBYDMseaODVqre0hJZUoG93ulL_NIL4LttBGxXgajzcX0zGcxSLu2aWNAXPgJBbLSYFjKXUM30sKb0tu6_6vn3Qj5FPhG2FqlhB768d8A5s6XdmaPXF2jdg-dO8XnGxPmfJ_Hm3hNu4iiCGfvi7JoPxhlKZyeHod8rPebNsijzJvJKsIG8dKv2iXK21rPHnOHb5je-IA%3D%3D)_
---
Thank you,Jason Miyares

name: HOUSE UPDATE via The Collective PAC
subject: the fight to take back the House starts NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. | | Our first candidate of 2023 is here ⇩⇩⇩

**Progressive Black champion, State Sen. Jennifer McClellan, is running for Virginia’s 4th congressional seat. And get THIS, the primary election is TUESDAY!!!**

So, Peter, the fight to take back the House starts NOW.

[We have the chance to chip away at the GOP majority in the House and it starts with this seat. AKA, it starts Tuesday!!! **Peter — don’t forget. The GOP has a relatively slim margin in Congress.**

Winning this one seat could make a HUGE difference in passing critical legislation like protecting voting rights and codifying _Roe._ And we really can’t afford to let another House seat fall into the hands of Kevin McCarthy and the rest of the GOP...

[With YOUR support, we can win this seat and start to chip away at the GOP’s power in the House. Can you rush a $10 donation today to help give Jennifer McClellan the funds to win this seat?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5RfQVBlgA8RWXmAqUF9Z9IcT7JPlmlRKITXC9uxufgbQ9NvBoNZdtiV60w_cEKtoWq7IVHVWnowfjdsMq7_FYfyTqSg1ljax4Q-nRmIUnefr-lXQzQ0qE_DQRkxx7P30B8BeiXpaMlBPJhoIIPEo_eqrfBI-gAjv6zmJ6ZDy_7kFPkG38c5_zz0FKa1US7O_xn3YqHSYw6_aw6HS2h1z3UDgqkllTZqtKobFudXRhpmAzMcVnANeGtGzDpnz_y-vCgbdvx70pY17U0uRX7ourf7H-4EqJeFUzSQGDxxo9ghhGNahZfyt9W16uu4RMIK9DF9bQZaLmv-pSrJEWu-iz-k/3s1/PZiD4LwpRHWc2sVOPAKBow/h8/KrWK41sW8P66DCoCe_j2ImA-gkSB2RfXCxi0fnA4y-Q)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101”
| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8huvmhqo3quog86bqudipl4fupf5qj7mue99h18_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h64or4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm8hih1an0ppv17e3q4hs3nbpanbfos87tne2eng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h64or4chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z661q9t0uono7b355joe12jruo5s1u37f3fll46o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h64or4chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

subject: ALERT: Conservative News You Won't Want to Miss!
body:
We cover all the fallout from last Saturday's state central committee meeting, and the IL GOP's plans to right the ship

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/1f5507d7a56a/alert-conservative-news-you-wont-want-to-miss?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

IL GOP Disrespects Grassroots, Creating Outreach Committee to Pretend They Care (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-disrespects-grassroots-creating-outreach-committee-to-pretend-they-care.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The IL GOP plans to “reach out” to grassroots conservatives in much the same way that it purportedly has been reaching out to minority communities and other communities that it pretends to care about, with little results.

But after Saturday’s performance by the SCC, the notion of an Outreach Committee is dubious at best. Saturday’s meeting presented the IL GOP with an incredible opportunity to welcome grassroots conservatives with open arms. Instead, the IL GOP did everything to signal to the grassroots that their voices didn't matter and they weren't welcome.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-disrespects-grassroots-creating-outreach-committee-to-pretend-they-care.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-disrespects-grassroots-creating-outreach-committee-to-pretend-they-care.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

GOP State Central Committee's Donation Problem: Most Don't Donate to IL GOP, Despite Kolber Belittling Grassroots (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/gop-state-central-committees-donation-problem-most-dont-donate-to-the-il-gop-despite-kolber-belittling-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The IL GOP establishment has a message for the grassroots: if you don’t donate to the party, then your voice doesn’t matter.

And this obsession with money has played out over the last several weeks in public comments for all to see and hear.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/gop-state-central-committees-donation-problem-most-dont-donate-to-the-il-gop-despite-kolber-belittling-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/gop-state-central-committees-donation-problem-most-dont-donate-to-the-il-gop-despite-kolber-belittling-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Abandoning Republican Principles Not a Winning Strategy for Illinois GOP (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/abandoning-republican-principles-not-a-winning-strategy-for-illinois-gop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The base of our party is tired of being ignored. Yes, we need donors to get our message out but more importantly we need an actual message. The path to victory is not finger pointing and playing the blame game but rather to unify around the basic principles of individual liberty, limited government, free market economics, and a respect for life and our Constitution that defines our party. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/abandoning-republican-principles-not-a-winning-strategy-for-illinois-gop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/abandoning-republican-principles-not-a-winning-strategy-for-illinois-gop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Inside the IL GOP's Obsession with Money and Protecting Chairman Don Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In the movie The Skulls, Sen. Ames Levritt says,

“Our rules supersede those of the outside world.”

But more than just a movie line, it’s the mission statement for many in power, including the IL GOP establishment. In addition to rules not applying to the establishment, there’s also an unhealthy obsession with money.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Establishment Rips Mic away from Minority Grassroots Leader During GOP Meeting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-rips-mic-away-from-minority-grassroots-leader-during-gop-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
On the IL GOP website under, “Who We Are,” it says,

“Our party welcomes individuals who share our common beliefs while having deeply held, yet differing views. Diversity brings strength. We commit to resolve our differences with civility, trust, and mutual respect.”

But during Saturday’s GOP state central committee meeting (SSC), these beliefs were thrown out the window as the GOP establishment belittled, humiliated, and even tried to silence many in the crowd of the more than 200 conservative grassroots activists who descended upon the Bolingbrook Golf Club so their voices could be heard.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-rips-mic-away-from-minority-grassroots-leader-during-gop-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-rips-mic-away-from-minority-grassroots-leader-during-gop-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IL GOP Treasurer to Grassroots: "If You Haven't Donated, then Why Are You Here?" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During a quarterly IL Republican Party State Central Committee (SSC) meeting in Bolingbrook on Saturday, approximately 200 conservative grassroots activists filled the room in a stunning display to publicly share their grievances about the disappointing losses during the November 8th election; the lack of support they received from the party; and demanding that chairman Don Tracy resign. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=64bcc33983-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-64bcc33983-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Trump on social media has proven to be a danger to our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I sent a letter to Facebook urging them to extend Donald Trump’s Facebook ban beyond the two years after the assault he incited on our Capitol on January 6th.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN)
Derek,
This week I sent a letter to Facebook urging them to extend Donald Trump’s Facebook ban beyond the two years after the assault he incited on our Capitol on January 6th.
Facebook’s self-imposed deadline to extend or terminate Trump’s account ban is coming up next month — and just last week, **Trump called for the suspension of the United States Constitution on his social media app Truth Social, so he could be reinstated president. All while he made the same false claims of fraud and used the same incendiary rhetoric that got him kicked off the platform to begin with.**
I mean, do I really need to go on from there? Trump used social media to fan the flames of the insurrection, and he has only gotten more extreme and dangerously unhinged since that time. After all, he is promising to pardon the people who beat police officers to keep him in power. How can that be consistent with any community standards on Facebook or anywhere else?
**[Derek, add your name to the letter I sent to Facebook urging them to extend Donald Trump’s Facebook ban so that he cannot use their platform to incite violence and undermine our democracy.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221216-trump-facebook-ban-vsp/.2c2PKY&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221216_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221216-trump-facebook-ban-vsp/.2c2PKY&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221216_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN)
---
It’s obvious that Trump has only grown more authoritarian in his tendencies, and more likely to spread election conspiracies such as those advanced by the losing GOP gubernatorial nominee in Arizona, Kari Lake.
Yet, Twitter’s new owner Elon Musk has already reinstated Trump’s account — even while hate speech on his platform has exploded and fanned multiple far-right and QAnon conspiracy theories.
Trump is no ordinary private citizen. He is a former president with a legion of MAGA cult followers whose violence brought irreparable harm to our democracy.
This twice-impeached, disgraced con artist has shown no remorse for the violence he incited. That should disqualify him from ever reappearing on any reputable social media platform again.
**[If you agree, add your name to co-sign my letter to Facebook headquarters to extend Trump’s ban.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221216-trump-facebook-ban-vsp/.2c2PKY&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221216_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN)**
Your voice makes a real difference in this matter — thanks for raising it today.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1460%2E5257348%2ErdaoMN)

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9eh5ehpn4lne7gqsvbjvvrjg0u5hf6ran85t0uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3cgqpfn72f62mc8rlppih4s21lb24amh803drj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zocq08h31bi2popibj1bovr9lggv9c696q07btu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zfodd5k2rk4873dhsuv7vs8bqhudikqui3jc8tno).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8am418801naoo6jooq33q7ceqhradkehcfsgc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Hey there, It’s Patrick, Wes’ finance director. Just wanted to follow up since Wes reached out to you yesterday about our crucial End-of-Year fundraising goal. Wes and Aruna are already hard at work leading the transition process ahead of the January 18 inauguration. Because of that, they haven’t had much time to fundraise. It’s critical that fundraising continues, because it gives us the opportunity to keep connecting with Marylanders all over the state. We have to rebuild our infrastructure, support Democrats across Maryland, plan more events to connect with people, and more; and the fundraising that the campaign does now gives us the chance to continue that work. **Unlike a lot of campaigns who can fundraise any time all year long, we have to pause all fundraising activity once Wes and Aruna are sworn-in and the state legislature goes into session.** That has the potential to set us back in our fundraising, which is crucial to keeping our movement going over these next four years while Wes and Aruna are in office. **So we’re setting a big goal to reach by midnight on December 31, 2022: $75,000.** **[We only have two weeks left until the year ends and we need to reach our goal. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdgpl07nae32gtp5a2746qaq9mos00429snqau18_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z81a7tc2o663i2tubin6o20o17vaoicbfvshd4vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvuqbsp49ssa2c7k2r7b1hqp9pjrn83vp2lqm21o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziahjcnhrpguem50nahdi01l9br0glu4h8sibd68_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfnkjgivshqcdvg0e3797djfrk2m39dlu65ed1l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5jjgvi2altue7vkfbjfhks4pf1in7u53922povo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7smlv1qhl4vdhk5c0roj1vad4roe0011i6pauro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpq59t65r3esmjdad5k4f8vd1ffeln5crjf38do0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqk8mtsc7hbo3q7adt02hu7lc8na681d9mm22h58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrvupp8ggaihooh2268i9kr9rqp6jrooti616388_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlu2qboro1n7sb94sr43a7276leju9e6cma6bspg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcabro9g1a948e1dfficvkno8i459o3pbdj30gn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2slmdp5ovvubjjm6v0smhhed24q5v5tf4mence8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ko1dbqr5breg5r56rusev6o2b48m2aslp1rnlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt6ujp0n8ums5r3bgc3pu5d6cps66bcrc71safbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6cenmge37qtjh3rcga6lk4cqg626bbbrp9v5s9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhqdjvquga8ras0t9kl20u8b0mkhiqv2rea50iho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2r9vsqqgnr6trnvpr7hbjv2fhe1t2tofisb0ih0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h62ob2clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zrpbnplhd5uqfo8vbm4i5g5pv0m2711sffhnkp9g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp2iqt11agvkpj03lpf0o34b338sc0o8no1bp5go_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chh64ob1c9im49fg)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: The Border Crisis Just Got a Lot Worse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH1vsAQ61SiH1ZO-ZgQmqTbLt4bZbFaE9UqBJrY5QXaq5t7obmzYX-wzoFOONbxAU91QcGDNZPaoEHNo8pxH3tIaoMuGYfRLzp6OKDPqHCRqDfv2PqMDhR0-rj3yFJ2Psvn-ggFHPx1Kri2k5snLIw5bKwS9WMfnTstHFCKTeYRtH5eSU8s0cbm6Zak3oWrBp9nI9XgaEpU74U2QCaZbLuYtgnCHTujjaoUwQm5rWzix5IMHjFEYtSvkKdnIZoKfV413W0ft81OqezyK8GY4LE1ntIGpmOG79Gy&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==)
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I called out Secretary Mayorkas over footage that revealed the Mexican government bussing thousands of migrants to our southern border, as our border facilities in El Paso are being totally overwhelmed. And I fact checked Biden's claims that his economic plan is working for America. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your campaign brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| THE MEXICAN GOVERNMENT IS BUSSING MIGRANTS TO OUR SOUTHERN BORDER
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH1RM3ZvL2C8KwxVPQklBtnRl6RYXpYpiqafEhiCJkuHGTAffhMKH9mKE9RN4qkNuqsG6z01-b4dRaJQ4ecS768HA==&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH1RM3ZvL2C8KwxVPQklBtnRl6RYXpYpiqafEhiCJkuHGTAffhMKH9mKE9RN4qkNuqsG6z01-b4dRaJQ4ecS768HA==&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==)
---
| |
---
| What you're seeing in the footage above are busses full of migrants. They're coming from Mexico's southern border and they're being escorted by Mexican police to their northern border, which is, of course, our southern border.
The Mexican government is bussing tens of thousands of migrants just to come across our border. The result is [scenes like we saw in El Paso](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH1l7HwTF84BNvy848Uwi_A0XD7e_jk-fKCJY-1gYvC3tdn1YcdpPGmpqP0J9Rn-nHGT_cV6V9WxPnURzk4BIz8y8ZB7gHNF5Gz2wBH2b5ezDsQ3JgAyi4Kf_eTTwDH8bp_&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==) earlier this week, where a caravan of over 1,000 migrants crossed the river in one morning and [overwhelmed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH19oE0fFsxoPg2DXLiagGSrOqBoio9iUr3_EStC9DyrWferUbJWzHt78uuKWoeoQNIIuy7zs_vKkaS2OPTgZS3_ZDGnNlaTy-DPg1BDqQbOo73Mg-vHyZnjq1b1JnkEh8CXqn4EhvbG4ZXRi4eErMiR7Ej3jczRSRAxifCYVrC80o_CA71HiexBQ==&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==) the city's homeless shelters.
This is part of a bigger problem that nobody ever really addresses: communication with other countries.
Under President Trump, we had agreements with Mexico and the Northern Triangle countries which stopped the flow of migrants. The Mexican government was stopping migrants from coming across their southern border. Mexican police guarded their northern border looking southward.
So when you see an entire caravan of these buses being escorted by Mexican police, you better believe that the Biden Administration absolutely knows about it and has sanctioned it.
And why aren't migrants deported once they cross over? It's the State Department's job to establish agreements with other countries to accept immigrant deportation flights. They aren't doing this. Even if Immigrations and Customs Enforcement had all the planes and holding facilities it needed, there wouldn't be anywhere to go, in some cases.
In the midst of all this chaos, Secretary Mayorkas actually paid [a visit](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH1CF6sAMHXD0zu5kRjVfnqE_tmZSk-Y3MqWS5cbgwGG7jWmLipDzCcPFosGF_FXvBQmUJ1JAb7yMWYPEaolX5njCz8p1C3hydmQhkdhDOJFfvYj4tF7Qic5dADmXIPsaTOTskd3aYutr4=&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==) to El Paso this week. Did he go to see the border or visit the processing center? No. Did he address the migrant bussing crisis? No.
Instead Mayorkas had the nerve to look Border Patrol agents in the eye and say "I never said the border was secure." Except he did say the border was secure in [testimony](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQsW7ztU0uBZmQWLLaVK9gty2tSVuD2CFxkIuaBm_JaKUjrlVL9QhBxTvmwpJHH1IDSV2tlyOBYT2VnRMPMDxY4QGogM8ATmq41yCEK-bJpibd__osTQPNTSJtSxlrTVQ9gkDWKEiDL4_nj7k9TLypvGgsJof_2aMWC9WP0tzyPWew6zls8y2aAyGj-99QX5fo4QfSDcQXMBGfLfWuI2o90VmUDz4zwWi6Ywv9Poft0edeK-EV6rliOvph6gv8Pok2gmjuCkbCj8Eexr1jmngA-sxgDJ8buL&c=QQwqIbpIW48v3kfqLcwZlGiKe93FzYNcppnmfxDMsUA3Gek2jF1Kyg==&ch=2PJslP0BGeeWcnA9EXpOpFkfnXhW775thXJ2arz0xpIVuQ6DJBYpgg==) before the House Judiciary Committee last month.
Mayorkas is a complete failure as leader of our Border Patrol and must face accountability for his dereliction of duty to secure the homeland. Republicans are going to do everything we can in the new Congress to make that happen.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| BIDEN CLAIMS HIS ECONOMIC PLAN IS WORKING. LET'S LOOK AT THE DATA.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Americans are working? Labor force participation is near a 45 year low -- 62.1%. Economy growing? Many sources are still forecasting a recession in 2023. Income up? Real earnings are down 3.7%. body:
Democrats are making critical investments in our nation’s workers and families, and we need to keep it up. | |

Derek, one of my favorite parts about being out on the road -- and one of Joe’s, too -- is getting to speak with people one-on-one about the issues that matter most to them. clean_body: Democrats are making critical investments in our nation’s workers and families, and we need to keep it up. | | Derek, one of my favorite parts about being out on the road -- and one of Joe’s, too -- is getting to speak with people one-on-one about the issues that matter most to them. That is why I’m pleased to say that you could be one of the people Joe speaks to next. When you chip in $7 to the DNC today, you will help protect and expand our majorities in the years ahead, and Joe could call to thank you personally for making an investment in the Democratic Party. Every single day, Democrats are working to build a better America. We’re making critical investments in our nation’s workers and families, and we need to keep it up. This grassroots team -- including you, Derek -- makes all of this possible. name: Claudia Tenney
subject: slandered...smeared...shadowbanned—still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c7e3f10a0a44743b9667f41954bf049&_e=k5fNomlh4nEFFSlX9zlEYdjB2hrJwH-xQosMqGJkc_KqlycUxfKEpv8d4pwXo5ShwA4sEUKioFqO41Noi85PBQQVGpfJsHSOgCqESohixkqakz2Lwlhjad1v4WpXHj7GbwujzTB1tv8nV9lUB0MIOm6cH4RMFaxAfa527DhpCYAXs4wzkbwda-ihsQ2dTzTPNsQZJcgiB9NtIIYH-ukhiCALGy5iNQykuYEAP4hYT8qa38oNM7Gc_tGAV_F-LsSxZelF52_BSavt0WEweeZD4hmub3CcLghN8gTvJQXKA1NCpbwgcWawAxRvcKi2LhnfyT_TYCfPxTO6ylI1m57g9WAjs5WscAS_MfH5wQmtpjM1JIFl_8k19604q3bbUk8CiXDstV1cwCWcbWOMtJKrciTNKxbckI3qELAlCqMMmvw5YoYJKOxMcBNgiqbu1R7A)
---
| | Peter, I’m Claudia Tenney –– I’m a _small business owner_ , _Marine mom_ , and _conservative congresswoman_ from New York. I’m also heading up the _Election Integrity Caucus_ , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a **100-DAY LONG** post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by _**NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**_
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c7e3f10a0a44743b9667f41954bf049&_e=k5fNomlh4nEFFSlX9zlEYdjB2hrJwH-xQosMqGJkc_KqlycUxfKEpv8d4pwXo5ShwA4sEUKioFqO41Noi85PBQQVGpfJsHSOgCqESohixkqakz2Lwlhjad1v4WpXHj7GbwujzTB1tv8nV9lUB0MIOm6cH4RMFaxAfa527DhpCYAXs4wzkbwda-ihsQ2dTzTPNsQZJcgiB9NtIIYH-ukhiCALGy5iNQykuYEAP4hYT8qa38oNM7Gc_tGAV_F-LsSxZelF52_BSavt0WEweeZD4hmub3CcLghN8gTvJQXKA1P-_YqFP7MjTDwtusoB619tsBz06hMVcy7ZpTL0nOSW9k8aIo7lJOuoBEnWtNjKGL7JSlbeK79Ayo-KEOKwJ-9FgY9TpaUmIipDU7TQ1EzJdYCznudWRYi-IBAq3E3fGxLCwFEfTf23KbY2SAf-WH0a)
---
| | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent’s chance for victory was slim.
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c7e3f10a0a44743b9667f41954bf049&_e=k5fNomlh4nEFFSlX9zlEYdjB2hrJwH-xQosMqGJkc_KqlycUxfKEpv8d4pwXo5ShwA4sEUKioFqO41Noi85PBQQVGpfJsHSOgCqESohixkqakz2Lwlhjad1v4WpXHj7GbwujzTB1tv8nV9lUB0MIOm6cH4RMFaxAfa527DhpCYAXs4wzkbwda-ihsQ2dTzTPNsQZJcgiB9NtIIYH-ukhiCALGy5iNQykuYEAP4hYT8qa38oNM7Gc_tGAV_F-LsSxZelF52_BSavt0WEweeZD4hmub3CcLghN8gTvJQXKA1MJ0uk-xFzFEuK3oJdwRYVZhIxPHnqOCjxptcri2K9LXBkeyuch2aSvQOas9A4uZOumtWy_mxmxVCt02cEwN7z6Sd6wTdDPhjlJSo-hiFebjzQJRVud6HQhSBuxKkJnsRO7pT3LrMrcU9zHKFpv3_VM)
---
| Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead.
---
| | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. **After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim** _**123**_**votes! ****

****That didn’t stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn. ** I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c7e3f10a0a44743b9667f41954bf049&_e=k5fNomlh4nEFFSlX9zlEYdjB2hrJwH-xQosMqGJkc_KqlycUxfKEpv8d4pwXo5ShwA4sEUKioFqO41Noi85PBQQVGpfJsHSOgCqESohixkqakz2Lwlhjad1v4WpXHj7GbwujzTB1tv8nV9lUB0MIOm6cH4RMFaxAfa527DhpCYAXs4wzkbwda-ihsQ2dTzTPNsQZJcgiB9NtIIYH-ukhiCALGy5iNQykuYEAP4hYT8qa38oNM7Gc_tGAV_F-LsSxZelF52_BSavt0WEweeZD4hmub3CcLghN8gTvJQXKA1PAsNdT5E9nATfnhu7uky1ZUFZGBe4FlcDYursaLLOccgPHGAMQQuGm364BfpL79wjw7f2CEqBTblKb-c7C7zrMxo7NFKtjs17KDHMrAbKs8zQxaL3e0CW4Y2bKHNqmelO8aImWw_ZSjVdRC_LY7z91)
---
That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: ** ➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs** ** ➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting**** ➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots** And foremost, ensuring our elections are: **FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅** For leading this fight, I’ve been constantly attacked: **Slandered by the Radical Left...** **Smeared by the Mainstream Media...** **Shadowbanned by Big Tech...****

**But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That’s because I’m fighting to take back New York, I’m fighting to save America, and I’m fighting for you, Peter! **Peter, they wouldn’t be attacking me if I weren’t effective in this fight—**[**a fight that I hope you’ll consider supporting with a small donation today!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c7e3f10a0a44743b9667f41954bf049&_e=k5fNomlh4nEFFSlX9zlEYdjB2hrJwH-xQosMqGJkc_KqlycUxfKEpv8d4pwXo5ShwA4sEUKioFqO41Noi85PBQQVGpfJsHSOgCqESohixkqakz2Lwlhjad1v4WpXHj7GbwujzTB1tv8nV9lUB0MIOm6cH4RMFaxAfa527DhpCYAXs4wzkbwda-ihsQ2dTzTPNsQZJcgiB9NtIIYH-ukhiCALGy5iNQykuYEAP4hYT8qa38oNM7Gc_tGAV_F-LsSxZelF52_BSavt0WEweeZD4hmub3CcLghN8gTvJQXKA1MmRtRlmNbRikaoScYM5FWbz4XaHQ-X5HAHp2HtHdu9ARbaTNWgaXwYdRLql7QtpIi7XTvc2cb32hNF9gqM2TH4ZZ4eyjHtYtrE_7J5hzDuAOZVOwu95np-WooZh9eAzvD35nWTpxOGAQcXxl49Mg3e) Thank you,Claudia Tenney

clean_body: At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes...| | | | | Peter, I’m Claudia Tenney –– I’m a small business owner , Marine mom , and conservative congresswoman from New York. I’m also heading up the Election Integrity Caucus , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a 100-DAY LONG post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by NEARLY 30,000 VOTES! | | | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent’s chance for victory was slim. | | | Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead. | | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim 123votes! That didn’t stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn. I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system. That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: ➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs ➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting ➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots And foremost, ensuring our elections are: FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅ For leading this fight, I’ve been constantly attacked: Slandered by the Radical Left... Smeared by the Mainstream Media... Shadowbanned by Big Tech... But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That’s because I’m fighting to take back New York, I’m fighting to save America, and I’m fighting for you, Peter! Peter, they wouldn’t be attacking me if I weren’t effective in this fight— Thank you,Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Pramila's iPhone
subject: A personal request for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
From the moment I first launched my campaign for Congress in 2016, I have never wavered in my belief in our grassroots movement. And I know what else I believe in: outsized spending and dark money should not buy our elections.
**I don’t believe that our politics and policies should be bought, so I won’t be either.** I have never accepted a single cent from corporate PACs or dark money groups, and I never will. And I know that it only makes our movement stronger, because people power wins.
[**Peter, would you take a moment to give to our grassroots campaign today, so we can stay on track for our 2022 goals and end the year on a high note?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25249?refcode=em20221216-1959&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1959%2E420207%2E9ewL9r)
**I say this because I want to remind you that what we do now matters.** Very soon, our new session of Congress will begin, with Republican control of the House, but also with more progressives than ever before.
This time of the year can be challenging for campaigns, when we take stock of our resources and make sure we reach all of our goals for the year — all while fundraising declines and many of us log off for the holidays.
_I’m writing to you now because I wanted to personally make a request._ We are halfway through the last month of the year, and it’s very important that we can raise the resources we need for our budget heading into 2023.
I am not here to guilt trip you. There is no imaginary donor who will triple match your donation, and the sky is not falling. **Just you and me, and my sincere hope that you will recognize the importance of this moment.**
[**If you are in a position to make a contribution today, I would appreciate it greatly. Please know that your support always makes a difference for us.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25249?refcode=em20221216-1959&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1959%2E420207%2E9ewL9r)
At the end of the day, every election I’ve won, every fundraising goal I’ve hit, every milestone I’ve worked with our Progressive Caucus to achieve — it all comes down to you.
Thank you for your steadfast support.
Pramila
(Sent from my iPhone)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221216-1959-footer&t=3&refcode2=1959_420207_9ewL9r&akid=1959%2E420207%2E9ewL9r)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=1959%2E420207%2E9ewL9r)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1959%2E420207%2E9ewL9r)
