name: =?utf-8?Q?Claudia=20Tenney?=
subject: slandered...smeared...shadowbanned—still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c8a9d2a570&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney –– I’m a _small business owner_ , _Marine mom_ , and _conservative congresswoman_ from New York. I’m also heading up the _Election Integrity Caucus_ , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a **100-DAY LONG** post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by _**NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**_
---
| [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b7365c8fec&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent’s chance for victory was slim.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5be6f85a46&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead.
---
| | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. **After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim** _**123**_**votes! ****

****That didn’t stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn.** I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system.
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3668c34db8&e=fdefed58de)
---
That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: **➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs** **➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting** **➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots** And foremost, ensuring our elections are: **FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅** For leading this fight, I’ve been constantly attacked: **Slandered by the Radical Left...** **Smeared by the Mainstream Media...** **Shadowbanned by Big Tech...****

** But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That’s because I’m fighting to take back New York, I’m fighting to save America, and I’m fighting for you! **Friend, they wouldn’t be attacking me if I weren’t effective in this fight—**[**a fight that I hope you’ll consider supporting with a small donation today!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3f085ba851&e=fdefed58de) [ ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4f2fc9c210&e=fdefed58de) Thank you, Claudia Tenney
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=aad9e38641&e=fdefed58de)
---
|
---
|
---

---

Peter, Last week, Eric reached out looking for feedback from supporters about what issues are top of mind before the new Congress goes into session on January 3. So many of you have responded to the survey, and the results so far have been intriguing. Take a look:
---
| **Issue** | **% of respondents who listed issue as highly important**
---|---
**Protecting our Democracy** | **73%**
**Gun Violence Prevention** | **72%**
**Climate Change** | **70%**
What do you think, Peter? We’re closing the books on this survey at midnight tonight, but we still need a few more people to share their input to get an accurate look at where Eric’s support network stands.

name: Rick Scott
subject: I need your input!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I’m ready to get to work in 2023 to save America from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

_We have a lot of work ahead of us, and it won’t be easy._
_**But I know with YOU on my team, we can achieve ANYTHING.**_

I’m putting together our action plan for next year, and I need input from my most trusted conservatives.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter.
There’s a LOT we must handle, and I want to know what issue YOU think I should tackle first.
[**What’s YOUR top GOP priority for 2023?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=5e2bb9ba5483420bbc98c0054afb34c1&_e=nflIPAoqt-7_g_mId_eJtxCXPrC5EJ88chcXs5ukDWnH2FCvsjVCdCHYfsZthxtR6qnvWRSGCB3AqC8QH1zGUs9JSd9DofCKkqlTMoGkAkWYPhsSVUfTB1bwHxeS1RD80YXxgvscWjpkbW8aipOabMLnRx_QUSkUTUm5rx976Ynjh14jaI6MR-t6jR0PkcJrRDubnI3b5m8liRaJwuWxfXDe7EHKBOq8S4EZGGZ2ZoAb_r1jfK_H5up6FwUvm3zx6kX6fBMw__DxhZg1CD0XByb3EiDcHKZAsWeFlfpfYiTM8ETB4nKGlZScpypCS_p3lZEB3ujvaJRo9yHAdETpRu4rHAtlsxWY_ObFjgmeAQU8YrmJv3h40-GUujDn6m6N)

body:
Before I have to move on to another patriot.

|

| | | 🚨🚨 **LAST AND FINAL CALL TO CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY** 🚨🚨

Hi there Friend,

This is your _**LAST AND FINAL CALL**_ to secure your signed copy of my new memoir, _Not My First Rodeo_! Because fewer than 50 signed copies remain!

Copies have been flying off the shelves, and we are down to our last box. I wish I could sign a copy for every conservative supporter, but sadly this exclusive offer must come to a close.

_**[So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgh77vot4ot8fpj6g194vho42qig752a7shdekeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9h69o72c5h2bs "So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!")**_

Friend,

2023 is the year we Take Back America from the Radical Socialists that control it. It’s the year we begin putting **AMERICA FIRST AGAIN.**

[**Donate now to start FRESH**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=90c3eba1d7fd4793a23a123f9a8105a0&_e=qstcBnnP1tCJwDW57gbDOs05lMEc1JAooitbQs1oHjtZmqOJlgEM-YFUhfuZQovNeAqU0dy4cyDZd9YVizAQ9U44i9FK1UWKlQoXqnWu-t-73JQq_fTgrxpE14KzeoudkRjKdWsYYB1oSDmHF7S3u1ics2mfAPgif8H9FNLmKRdwsa8PfsCUw8FjCYBhJHCMPL2d0CwgGwZTahRgtISaXNcvhl8wlqg88NsfsdaOovVPP1jH8kIH4FKWWQhYCfh7qX8kmBrRIGQdoMawc92D8X8xchieDgyQIiIkC_41dUcqZ3_wbYnvs6zxgZbog0XrScMPDOJDIr-T5njZ0n2gY65wytGxgsM5MB2b86VH5Wf5Rv9raPgCYVbNJEmb2Ka0nTX5A3ilzWIKvkRJFbV0T964KzhYaHJaiK7eF3Z8S-jrnfkEy44f4Nvf3UnmIlM7AmzCKJNtMXEcmcks178_GHuYbTIUB62lL7KuGRcTroWRqJtXPohvz1fCQX_L_cR0Hj1MC318lroaLOwdpy-uotrl_Gmf8Ue4pktLdUQJOBY%3D)

**With a divided Congress, it’s going to be tricky, but with your help, we can make progress. We can jump start our economy and avoid a recession. We can secure our border, crush the Woke Agenda, and start putting America First again.**

**The people are WAKING UP!**

**I’m on your side.** My actions speak for themselves.

**Yours do too. I know you’re a strong patriot, so will you[ _rush a donation RIGHT NOW before 2022 ends to help our campaign hit our End-of-Year fundraising goals?_](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=90c3eba1d7fd4793a23a123f9a8105a0&_e=qstcBnnP1tCJwDW57gbDOs05lMEc1JAooitbQs1oHjtZmqOJlgEM-YFUhfuZQovNeAqU0dy4cyDZd9YVizAQ9U44i9FK1UWKlQoXqnWu-t-73JQq_fTgrxpE14KzeoudkRjKdWsYYB1oSDmHF7S3u1ics2mfAPgif8H9FNLmKRdwsa8PfsCUw8FjCYBhJHCMPL2d0CwgGwZTahRgtISaXNcvhl8wlqg88NsfsdaOovVPP1jH8kIH4FKWWQhYCfh7qX8kmBrRIGQdoMawc92D8X8xchieDgyQIiIkC_41dUcqZ3_wbYnvs6zxgZbog0XrScMPDOJDIr-T5njZ0n2gY65wytGxgsM5MB2b86VH5Wf5Rv9raPgCYVbNJEmb2Ka0nTX5A3ilzWIKvkRJFbV0T4XtWBzHnWkHIG68Wbjs70FXdO-tZH-UOLPcM_TMepiI2i13hCZ-QTeKY0N9KkKeX_vo7yaf5GgRxyBojaMO9yV-jp8fx3xZXSx-mwnGQgG79O12X7RJ27NGpj-SzN8ywntwD4OtcLpGQHcgGzY5L6w%3D)**

Thank you for your generosity in advance.

Sincerely,
JD

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

Braun](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056212/383705437/-143608129?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=&emci=fcde991d-457d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=4603d40e-6b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4925535) said the quiet part out loud: Indiana is failing Hoosier workers and families. **Who’s been in charge the entire time: Indiana Republicans.** Under the INGOP’s watch, Hoosiers have an [F-rated quality-of-life](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056214/383705439/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=&emci=fcde991d-457d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=4603d40e-6b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4925535) and the state has a [D- rated workforce](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056215/383705440/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=&emci=fcde991d-457d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=4603d40e-6b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4925535), a [C- rated education system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056216/383705441/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=&emci=fcde991d-457d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=4603d40e-6b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4925535), the [third worst maternal mortality rate in the nation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056217/383705442/-678275945?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=&emci=fcde991d-457d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=4603d40e-6b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4925535), and the [nation’s most polluted waterways](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056218/383705443/-1129088982?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=&emci=fcde991d-457d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=4603d40e-6b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4925535). Braun and Crouch are a part of the problem. They rejected [economic investments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56056219/383705444/-1612065418?emci=7aafd2d5-ca70-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=724cd99b-cb70-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13447588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAzZDQwZS02YjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dR-TXCQv7BTwXXaB4neqbktJGZTKtU8YSPCR1Quza_w=). They rejected infrastructure projects. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _Mike Braun and Suzanne Crouch both admit Indiana Republican policies have failed Hoosier families. During both campaign announcements this week, and said the quiet part out loud: Indiana is failing Hoosier workers and families. Who’s been in charge the entire time: Indiana Republicans. Under the INGOP’s watch, Hoosiers have an and the state has a , a , the , and the . Braun and Crouch are a part of the problem. They rejected =. They rejected infrastructure projects. Instead, they put their first, Indiana’s future last. It’s past time to fix the INGOP’s mess. It begins by electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot in 2023 and 2024 to give Indiana some common sense leadership. **Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Marrying the person you love should be codified into Indiana law - just like the . Luckily, Senator Andrea Hunley is proposing a bill that does just that. Why it matters: Should the U.S. Supreme Court overturn nationwide marriage equality, the Republican supermajority would swiftly move to ban marriage rights for LGBTQ couples. Senator Hunley’s bill would enshrine the right to marry for the who call Indiana home. name: Summer Lee
subject: It’s time to help Justice Democrats find more candidates like me
body:
#
Peter, it’s Summer Lee here.
I ran for Congress to represent the people of PA-12 _and won_. In less than a month, I will be making history as _the first_ Black woman ever elected to Congress from Pennsylvania. I didn’t do it alone; **Justice Democrats was by my side from day one of my campaign.**
Together, we built a people-powered movement from the ground up. We brought people from every corner of the district into our campaign for racial, economic, and environmental justice. We listened. We mobilized. And we made history.
**Justice Democrats is the real deal.** We all know that taking on the establishment is an uphill battle, but they know what it takes to win. In a field corrupted by corporate money and special interests, JD fights back by investing in working-class progressive challengers early and heavily.
[**Now JD needs our help to raise $120,000 for their 2024 Candidate Recruitment Fund that will allow them to find and support the next generation of Justice Democrats. Will you chip in $3 or more to fund their recruitment?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123395?refcode=em20221216-26585&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123395?refcode=em20221216-26585&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)**
Politics is not pretty. As a working class, progressive Black woman who didn’t take corporate PAC contributions, **a lot of powerful people in the establishment wanted to keep me out of office.**
AIPAC poured millions of dollars into our race, running smear campaigns and attacking me for being a “bad Democrat” -- and then supported my Republican opponent.
But we did something different -- we ran a 100% grassroots campaign with integrity, putting the people above politics. **Without JD’s support, I wouldn’t be headed to Congress to join the Squad and fight for you.**
**That’s why it’s so critical that Justice Democrats has the resources they need to find, recruit, support, and elect new progressives just like me — who will fight for the future we all deserve.**
[**I’m asking you to join me today and support JD so they can continue to build our progressive movement cycle after cycle. Can you donate $3, or any amount you can, to invest in the next round of candidate recruitment?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123395?refcode=em20221216-26585&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)
Solidarity forever,
Summer Lee
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123395?refcode=em20221216-26585&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)**

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221216-26585-footer&t=25&refcode2=26585_1203867_fNNREq&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=26585%2E1203867%2EfNNREq)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I'm taking a stand
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl0154l1firba5uhkjgcp9cjj4c3ih766c6p0qjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9j68or4cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zble9ts38bh2qa2dsd4jriov69v51b3v7l6n7ihg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9j68or4cjh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu6qpuu0757g3ugogjms03654uge6ek89bl82d3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9j68or4cjh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Hi there, Like my finance director Conor mentioned the other day, we’re only two weeks away from the end of 2022 and our last FEC fundraising deadline of the year. **Right now at the mid-December mark, we’re going to need help to hit our goal of $25,000 before the month ends. I’m hoping I can count on you!** The 2022 race to flip NM-02 blue was an extremely close one, and we already know my far-right opponent has filed to run against me in a rematch in 2024. As hard as it is to think about 2024 before I’ve even been sworn in, the GOP is on a mission to out-raise us from Day 1 — we cannot let that happen. When I go to Washington in January, I want to fully focus on legislating and working across the aisle to best serve the working families of New Mexico’s 2nd District. Reaching this goal through grassroots donations will help me do that instead of worrying about fundraising, and it will enable our campaign to keep reaching out to New Mexicans throughout my term. **Before we take time to celebrate the holidays and ring in the new year, can you help us hit our goal by pitching in $10 or whatever you can afford right now?** Here’s a personal link to make your contribution: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vas-email-dec2022/personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56064648/383742599/685856095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221216midmonth2_gv_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWI5MjNlZS05NjdkLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deRnoNpDmOGZhTy7PIq8_pqdamafUg5ukiSbokT8TnQ=) As always, thank you for your support! — Gabe | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

Before we take time to celebrate the holidays and ring in the new year, can you help us hit our goal by pitching in $10 or whatever you can afford right now? Here’s a personal link to make your contribution: = As always, thank you for your support! — Gabe | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBib7qyxQvMzLp35fUu-eBIipjl1H06XP01lGQySsgZug2JnibQl_RNdrPkxYF-Jp3UypC4gSHt2COfkY3wY8hn8L-3fTKj_k_NPgJKNq2yVCEZsxj6lr0c1lhPmx_nrqgKzMDYStjKRwSm2eZSLRt8HH93qxT9Ty_xwMYeGJMsavopYmjg0fc6VdmijK33iPPbbHyFRyvz5bO9BrPOC29dH-rjiTKAktXhfJSWHL9VfNFCXWstysiIP7oPUTtzzMELbfYPVSRiqdsFgk-oe00ec1dKvu58oKhCrN6dhEeDBW6QWoF_ocmvTinc9FoZOv9wuFOGUDcekUiodRTPBVDKSk/3s1/Y6ZEJEIJRzy0K9SqxhqjeQ/h0/SHkqETCM8FZMuWxV-NaOlQdPBaHlghslmSvn4hPFvGE) | | Dear Friend,

We are so grateful for the outpouring of support of The PossibiliTEA: Empowering the Next Generation Event! Through this Afternoon Tea Experience for youth, we learned about the issues that matter to them, and we empowered the youth to be the change that they wish to see. We are so grateful to have them on our historic journey for mayor! I am ready for them to be part of this glass breaking mission with me! We would like to thank Women for Amanda, Lauren Haller Fontaine, Shannon Davis Hunter and all those who made this event a big success! For those of you who weren’t able to attend, our team has put together a video you can watch below.

clean_body: We are so grateful for the outpouring of support of The PossibiliTEA: Empowering the Next Generation Event! | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. | | Dear Friend, We are so grateful for the outpouring of support of The PossibiliTEA: Empowering the Next Generation Event! Through this Afternoon Tea Experience for youth, we learned about the issues that matter to them, and we empowered the youth to be the change that they wish to see. We are so grateful to have them on our historic journey for mayor! I am ready for them to be part of this glass breaking mission with me! We would like to thank Women for Amanda, Lauren Haller Fontaine, Shannon Davis Hunter and all those who made this event a big success! For those of you who weren’t able to attend, our team has put together a video you can watch below. As you may already know, as 2023 quickly approaches, we’re working to bring our campaign to the next level, and all of our efforts would not be possible without you. That’s why I’m asking for your support today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Onwards, Amanda K. Edwards Amanda K. subject: Do you think we should play chicken with public school funding?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Will you take our one-question survey? | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wOAzkvtif-TREQXkSQPqbC6x7PE3bGnTd60Ep3veFfH74OVSuweQ4uF_1Fo6oW3jxkPnMp1unDYm3R7Bpi3jMTWXhuxGwd2d0mdvAofTl2o6c2dZYVwCyPFgXOGwaftgz3KuojDCyrKq4GV__qdb3BZ-rXCb82nK7TpRka1dQ4TauH2diJM53Iqpbe4DfHnYbQOVBD0oW0Hki6nMqoA9QZODBJ-RMr17a6cenW61AC7FpelbLiY5wQNhmyudYVMpAEVei2drkbanSwSJC_globPQFFprAl7ZBIF1C0u5_J-qbR9gZKKVOG6ZuNxICmy37NnJsR5Gox1F9xzlOHjmg7XgL2012Hv1KiXGKj92sLfB8dGunKsQRCwShZbczrAVLJJCl3Eqw5sItoV126wnpSHp-2WnX9ILgkDoNe_3WstVvzIJiVi_NTeGEMa5WyGuyjz0PjpRfFO0TgIc2yYk--XCHUkke-snHTHmlyp5HYyEhZfCAxoy8PafB6fV7KpK3i1JRVksYmLvsrK_fy4MadQ/3s1/F785I-CxT1yJSFwSoCx9wA/h0/JLz4_bDiRVZ9bHEMxjrvNGFCelF5aWtVfpiAPvjQS0c)

---
| Team,

For the last few years, Republicans have continually attacked our public schools. One of the worst examples of this is playing a game of chicken with the aggregate expenditure limit, preventing our schools from investing in our students and addressing teacher shortages.

**Republicans in the legislature were on the brink of letting our schools “default” which would have required closures and chaos.** But Democrats made a deal with the current Governor Doug Ducey on a state budget that would expand the limit if Ducey called a special session to address the limit later this year.

_Now, Republicans aren’t fulfilling their end of the deal._ We think it’s reckless to continue to force Arizona’s public schools into a debt limit game, rather than fully fund them. But we want to know your opinion.

**[Team, will you take our one-question survey to let us know whether you think the expenditure limit should be removed for good?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wOAzkvtif-TREQXkSQPqbC6x7PE3bGnTd60Ep3veFfH74OVSuweQ4uF_1Fo6oW3jxkPnMp1unDYm3R7Bpi3jMTWXhuxGwd2d0mdvAofTl2o6c2dZYVwCyPFgXOGwaftgz3KuojDCyrKq4GV__qdb3BZ-rXCb82nK7TpRka1dQ4TauH2diJM53Iqpbe4DfHnYbQOVBD0oW0Hki6nMqoA9QZNRFC_mwGOn_rYfvghBbrpFAtf70VmidjuLDwqlAs2X6XNpb_ZSN1AlChEswjuWkYJdj1qlSUByMY0PFBwVU8_aZo4NAQRryB1QBRbkCKPMeP6yl_IN7vRNAZoYWh284E0DjelcW9yPfRlV499zRhEtWqrJdSFDmCEAy7PIXHNL3mud12ZHTzcNJA8JnzAonpwzgsRJdn29BiGEjCoWbS9rxSla39oksUGLgYikOk0u32Q30BRPUoAekDsQF_FGU4jSc5zWkNCNkglitInbVa9qgGAsQ3lzrjxEThEjgSjspBAfTbCnyO_VsmpqSU5tsLQ/3s1/F785I-CxT1yJSFwSoCx9wA/h1/TapiXNhrgroOJdFnAgS6RiuRlG4EwS_DdfE9f1pDv7w)** [

clean_body: | | | Will you take our one-question survey? | | | Team, For the last few years, Republicans have continually attacked our public schools. One of the worst examples of this is playing a game of chicken with the aggregate expenditure limit, preventing our schools from investing in our students and addressing teacher shortages. Republicans in the legislature were on the brink of letting our schools “default” which would have required closures and chaos. But Democrats made a deal with the current Governor Doug Ducey on a state budget that would expand the limit if Ducey called a special session to address the limit later this year. Now, Republicans aren’t fulfilling their end of the deal. We think it’s reckless to continue to force Arizona’s public schools into a debt limit game, rather than fully fund them. But we want to know your opinion. **Deadline Midnight** Thank you for your input, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d10bec3fcd4ae38fb1b50be0f85f25&_e=YOszc9ER60ypwJEnzVoQjUy-DIKbqxVaSOatLitGLJi6fylPL6llyxWyCGRHsyDaoL7xdYYw3twrEE7-a0ctAw-KJfifSCFjPCxTI1RGQE01oOL3jJBTLxFyqxZP3o5IR35XBBkowbH1mW2VZI-IN0lLbsFgxjdnpz6wjtCTzIi_CrvYb_9XEkLaMTljryAkhs_Gh2J7ZZUpU-Rk3ZYmnFiXwqSRqRkaOgtGae-ZFQhIV6Oz27hQMcyJyrM2zHa_NyKJtxxXJWmJwsaPwFj0A9u5mKz1yGXh7GoI03hfrlQ%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d10bec3fcd4ae38fb1b50be0f85f25&_e=YOszc9ER60ypwJEnzVoQjUy-DIKbqxVaSOatLitGLJi6fylPL6llyxWyCGRHsyDaoL7xdYYw3twrEE7-a0ctAw-KJfifSCFjPCxTI1RGQE01oOL3jJBTLxFyqxZP3o5IR35XBBkowbH1mW2VZI-IN3Jxhrhz8rsgSY4tMOTV6ZXGMWVC81HKWpW9oQNh4yItkVTf_ebnymECsyJPZ_tkDrKcg49ktchOhF31n1JocPfoKk-3-BLhxjiVOhzjfUF_kBjBGo6yO3ePBtB6Zuej98H4ohWV1MIRjoonsB6PsfU%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d10bec3fcd4ae38fb1b50be0f85f25&_e=YOszc9ER60ypwJEnzVoQjUy-DIKbqxVaSOatLitGLJi6fylPL6llyxWyCGRHsyDaoL7xdYYw3twrEE7-a0ctAw-KJfifSCFjPCxTI1RGQE01oOL3jJBTLxFyqxZP3o5IR35XBBkowbH1mW2VZI-IN5-xSzN67s-rN8pN99C6cpKzhzwQIYqVLKpKgdWprYghIhLcQuTLPUEcWru5hRKbUjvSxx69Vwqvzh-Y075TDHh0yfNgnId-Y1GBFCT5zbLrL1X38fBluGyYWn-roUNE_RCrCYXojkNsOCFd3saF9Qg%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d10bec3fcd4ae38fb1b50be0f85f25&_e=YOszc9ER60ypwJEnzVoQjUy-DIKbqxVaSOatLitGLJi6fylPL6llyxWyCGRHsyDaoL7xdYYw3twrEE7-a0ctAw-KJfifSCFjPCxTI1RGQE01oOL3jJBTLxFyqxZP3o5IutxUJ-ug3mmvGYlLYSv_JlbsilLqH7K4EAQeDZhUiUttolfmlZMnnZQxO5DajfU0WxSfkN1dUWXFyipy_rJe815R0EN7JfmS0KmEil7qfds7OC24MEUK4ELbDOTbXYZaalmE4ufzqSs4ms0_FuW_yvnTMo1q6Am6idz3eUk7_3M%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0d7b62441f34b40aaaf91c06cae8029&_e=ev8pv5O0Cz1YsH7YA7e4TZG162bIxGWocanLo6_UHYHzGxN2bhUJcFFd8u2goPZsayBgfOCwESCldfjB-jIjmKkjPIgHyaeySISIjpJqfdwg_tv2nSTHBUF1cDMvH2tcXOcdoVxZzH2Cum3OatBilSvt2pap-TpPsvr0xe8XSexZ_V_PJY9gRt_dUMnZ5NxVQHrSjUhjf-E---2niVUCfvmNoHWKowEPhTOLem-cU2hqbOulWJ5zfzIg5t7gcmQVylTPpaWw5FVVVWd0Ez0qoEmJMaQhcpS_DDLyNxItXZhw8HWMfIRhWW3xtINQ6oQpSPWg0_wzgI2MrFlKA0GCxBStJlsdtkENOZlq7xV3B_wfwfHRvpVi56tCnhGOfZvJ)

Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0d7b62441f34b40aaaf91c06cae8029&_e=ev8pv5O0Cz1YsH7YA7e4TZG162bIxGWocanLo6_UHYHzGxN2bhUJcFFd8u2goPZsayBgfOCwESCldfjB-jIjmKkjPIgHyaeySISIjpJqfdwg_tv2nSTHBUF1cDMvH2tcXOcdoVxZzH2Cum3OatBilSvt2pap-TpPsvr0xe8XSexZ_V_PJY9gRt_dUMnZ5NxVQHrSjUhjf-E---2niVUCfvmNoHWKowEPhTOLem-cU2h7z4QCbH4RDJ7xYwBfCMYI-_a22KLQQYs1-usv1haT5mYK-tbnJgW1IFTHradhP3FEmF4JNBkgVqnsRoCEG2uq2tSe9VXVIVjqyydbaFXzD-yfdLilNHHfQgZr359uweDZJjKVl5Dwmbig7V9w34ch)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0d7b62441f34b40aaaf91c06cae8029&_e=ev8pv5O0Cz1YsH7YA7e4TZG162bIxGWocanLo6_UHYHzGxN2bhUJcFFd8u2goPZsayBgfOCwESCldfjB-jIjmKkjPIgHyaeySISIjpJqfdwg_tv2nSTHBUF1cDMvH2tcXOcdoVxZzH2Cum3OatBilSvt2pap-TpPsvr0xe8XSexZ_V_PJY9gRt_dUMnZ5NxVQHrSjUhjf-E---2niVUCfvmNoHWKowEPhTOLem-cU2i1reIWajmzSNeI3zQXEZ4m0dT4W58uHxbw--rMly_IioMRL84xRsRttOQhQLO3p97CvuM88Qh36NIJBKDzY4IXHQ83Unz3NVaLGCuX9PL2oIb7j9h2QVmpaLwnSKWV0B-licrUcJzNn98_F5HplZvV)

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0d7b62441f34b40aaaf91c06cae8029&_e=ev8pv5O0Cz1YsH7YA7e4TZG162bIxGWocanLo6_UHYHzGxN2bhUJcFFd8u2goPZsayBgfOCwESCldfjB-jIjmKkjPIgHyaeySISIjpJqfdwg_tv2nSTHBUF1cDMvH2tcXOcdoVxZzH2Cum3OatBilSvt2pap-TpPsvr0xe8XSexZ_V_PJY9gRt_dUMnZ5NxVQHrSjUhjf-E---2niVUCfvmNoHWKowEPhTOLem-cU2gtyNOEMlMxa1LUm0ScCl4EMC9wXBmb2BjM0Q_Pr2JKxPcgidwgzd04TA819XwaJItPAk6Jj2w4CPuguJZAqQefc9gYnWyXSnHBUcuicAoyUmVjzmk-QCzjk0yqFEf5C8IBspVoO5KKKAmAV1ZMD784) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

clean_body: As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along: From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews. From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham. In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently. And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus! | | | The Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day. | | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory this month. And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

She is fearless and tenacious, and when she stands up to speak, everyone listens. She's been a driving force for progressive change in Virginia, leading the passage of landmark laws to protect reproductive rights and voting rights, tackle climate change, invest in our schools, and expand healthcare.

With our help, Jennifer will bring her proven leadership and advocacy to Washington and make history as the first Black woman in Congress from our Commonwealth in our over 400-year history!

name: Jeff Ettinger
subject: So, What’s it Like to Run for Congress?
body:
A number of folks have said to me “You ought to write a book on what it was like to run for Congress”. Well, I definitely don’t have a full book worth of observations, but I decided to try my hand at an “article”. | Hi there. Let me ease your mind up front...this is NOT a fundraising email. In the month since the midterm election, I have enjoyed the opportunity to spend more time with my family and friends, and I have also been busy with an array of business and non-profit board meetings. A number of folks have said to me “You ought to write a book on what it was like to run for Congress”. Well, I definitely don’t have a full book worth of observations, but I decided to try my hand at an “article”. No obligation whatsoever to spend your time reading this, but if you are interested, [please click on this link.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0t6Ke6oybIu7rip7-lZ0cixDHZIumANPhjbkQtmbJVjMD1yELlG_NXr3h2D15BEOZRT7QHJxw2kbw8YF0Dde4Ogp9Fed8VKykKeotGhLjmS7MBhP0NqIRFvjYTMMKASIw1rdOHgAzNhhhmFj9qFT2OWz69b4W-uvfUEYWwUDY6R4HtF3_XHmag6LqcH8lBRYwVjbbzK9zO1Ie0PpoyenJ4Kzp1AVJjuuZDnngTgS20XA94ptEOAnongxBV1vglFuiNgbmM-kr4Rndf5Y6t6c7GuIh22EHuSEAIXD33PO-JII/3s1/AyIhIkCQS2in5Cx9fGMZnA/h0/xTRBZpJqLgMOMbxaMned-FQM1cy3WMjQjZi5b6Hx3Fw) I would enjoy hearing any reactions or thoughts you might have if you are willing to share them. I still believe we need more people who can cut through the partisan divide in our country, and I am hopeful that our campaign contributed to this effort. I applaud all of you volunteers and supporters for your key role in preserving our democratic infrastructure. Keep the faith! Jeff
---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/O93kI8o-kT9cRvZ9zJLPP23W7H9qpHR7DTBpQ546uYbqnbCY5wgeaFbZqlHnSUi617RZrJpvOX5hhX10bQjAZkO72u-gArMHh8U3IEFApvXDHSPRS_QqeKSzziuIDoKU44-vPcBkHfg3RBDV8V1OH2PaQts4vKEdnV_eo_-rSPBd0iW-by6qvOAFmTLJRSo4As8zJPfuf8Mwi_xQYnkaG2qUWgZIAvaYcaKOQGn2BGHM_XaJm9U7yL5oaBvaC9Wy/3s1/AyIhIkCQS2in5Cx9fGMZnA/h1/AG_25ngWwJ30gBXkKuuqzKkVnnhtwNlGY4X1swfzMrA). Donald J. Trump December 16th, 2022
ICYMI: President Trump Unveiled His New Free Speech Policy Initiative
Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump announced a new policy initiative aimed to dismantle the censorship cartel and restore free speech. Watch the video below:

[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kFFr5CAUhX9N8jaD3hgzechDp6ELO8tCodC-iaM3k7s1iUTTYfbX16TTgih-x3vkHGy4rDgAF1Wd26aEjrOcGmAJAZfA2EHIPQMJoIXmuqitOfNMMIvhfersNGpn_8V5GfzeTEPeN5wzexaC6bORpTFdASjKjmt-RmlBV7lr-hh9yIqHDJ7SSsOxD5Mh7VaLFQo2o3btZv6yeifopxBDOjmrS36oa1bUUMqyOPCseFrioAa0tAxZ0eKgyWUgVximZTaY4Gic0oN31N3ukklXTZcxiV9hd2RuAyk_YyCLY1RbLLWMH0gOreopqBGvqpsRVfCIpld-cmlK0UiRdKQP_Dafxpgsvj7eRQyRQ5E0NTqyif7Wj0dpb7_wssGebCqkff_zisG-nZ7zubH-Ss5RkFWq47JG2gq-Z2iy6pgBbHMAW5dwEse3v_L0emp31X__vGtlKa6rCo9pjzePP0_vLvt7VZBV7Se326d9)

**TRANSCRIPT: President Donald J. Trump — Free Speech Policy Initiative**

If we don’t have FREE SPEECH, then we just don’t have a FREE COUNTRY. It’s as simple as that. If this most fundamental right is allowed to perish, then the rest of our rights and liberties will topple just like dominos one by one. They’ll go down.

That’s why today, I am announcing my plan to shatter the left-wing censorship regime, and to reclaim the right to Free Speech for all Americans. And reclaim is a very important word in this case because they’ve taken it away.

In recent weeks, bombshell reports have confirmed that a sinister group of Deep State bureaucrats, Silicon Valley tyrants, left-wing activists, and depraved corporate news media have been conspiring to manipulate and silence the American People. They have collaborated to suppress vital information on everything from elections to public health.

The censorship cartel must be dismantled and destroyed — and it must happen immediately. And here is my plan:

**FIRST,** within hours of my inauguration, I will sign an executive order banning any federal department or agency from colluding with any organization, business, or person, to censor, limit, categorize, or impede the lawful speech of American citizens. I will then ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as “mis-” or “dis-information”. And I will begin the process of identifying and firing every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship—directly or indirectly—whether they are the Department of Homeland Security, the Department of Health and Human Services, the FBI, the DOJ, no matter who they are.

**SECOND,** I will order the Department of Justice to investigate all parties involved in the new online censorship regime, which is absolutely destructive and terrible, and to aggressively prosecute any and all crimes identified. These include possible violations of federal civil rights law, campaign finance laws, federal election law, securities law, and anti-trust laws, the Hatch Act and a host of other potential criminal, civil, regulatory, and constitutional offenses. To assist in these efforts, I am urging House Republicans to immediately send preservation letters — and we have to do this right now — to the Biden administration, the Biden campaign, and every Silicon Valley tech giant, ordering them not to destroy evidence of censorship.

**THIRD,** upon my inauguration as president, I will ask Congress to send a bill to my desk revising Section 230 to get big online platforms out of censorship business. From now on, digital platforms should only qualify for immunity protection under Section 230 if they meet high standards of neutrality, transparency, fairness, and non-discrimination. We should require these platforms to INCREASE their efforts to take down UNLAWFUL content, such as child exploitation and promoting terrorism, while dramatically curtailing their power to arbitrarily restrict lawful speech.

**FOURTH,** we need to break up the entire toxic censorship industry that has arisen under the false guise of tackling so-called “mis-” and “dis-information.” The federal government should immediately stop funding all non-profits and academic programs that support this authoritarian project. If any U.S. university is discovered to have engaged in censorship activities or election interferences in the past—such as flagging social media content for removal [and] blacklisting—those universities should lose federal research dollars and federal student loan support for a period of five years, and maybe more. We should also enact new laws laying out clear criminal penalties for federal bureaucrats who partner with private entities to do an end-run around the Constitution and deprive Americans of their First, Fourth, and Fifth Amendment rights. In other words, deprive them of their vote. And once you lose those elections and once you lose your borders like we have, you no longer have a country. Furthermore, to confront the problems of major platforms being infiltrated by legions of former Deep Staters and intelligence officials, there should be a 7-year cooling-off period before any employee of the FBI, CIA, NSA, DNI, DHS, or DOD is allowed to take a job at a company possessing vast quantities of U.S. user data.

**FIFTH,** the time has finally come for Congress to pass a digital Bill of Rights. This should include a right to digital due process—in other words, government officials should need a COURT ORDER to take down online content, not send information requests such as the FBI was sending to Twitter.

Furthermore, when users of big online platforms have their content or accounts removed, throttled, shadow-banned, or otherwise restricted no matter what name they use, they should have the right to be informed that it’s happening, the right to a specific explanation of the reason why, and the right to a timely appeal. In addition, all users over the age of 18 should have the right to opt-out of content moderation and curation entirely, and receive an unmanipulated stream of information if they so choose.

The fight for Free Speech is a matter of victory or death for America—and for the survival of Western Civilization itself. When I am President, this whole rotten system of censorship and information control will be ripped out of the system at large. There won’t be anything left.

By restoring free speech, we will begin to reclaim our democracy, and save our nation. Thank you, and God Bless America.

Donald J. Trump December 15th, 2022
ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Announces Plan to Restore Free Speech in America
Today President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to restore free speech in America. In videotaped remarks, President Trump responds to the ongoing revelations of widespread censorship by outlining five steps to dismantle the censorship cartel.

[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kM1u5CAQhJ_Gvs0IGv8efEjWyiGTRIo2UnJDGNpxb7CNDJ7R7NMHO7MrIRBf0YWqsOFFyQF4VtapaXLoOUupARYR8AIYq7LiyKAAUJniStRGdzzJmEH_NfdmnpQ1f8Kyju6o5zEdGg6d6vqy1FCxvDJcC-yqvOacI0PBMLXNEILzibhL4CGuOBwGP2tSdrPYYMYWVLbdzd827wjd7IOPJ2d1zqu6ZqKGvMhFxRPxsIZRjmhoHRPR4qjIJlBs0M_rojHCSVupRmepv94kHa-KPqco_oQ9kL6OJN2CngxOQe6x5DqdkSwaOZCXE15kvyBK7xD1IN1s45SkiQKpQGf8Zz5PIVr8fHwI6AMHETU5WTKRdnfP5_Pgst-POxzIxELar6d39Obj9JoujXEXspZ8UcY6PrdIe8G3DE1S3icA-xzA3iWcsvuPl-L0fmoP5V_3emiLPLtsKvyKe7g6_P_05nK8VQVJ2X4DAxynKw)

**_President Donald J. Trump's Plan to Dismantle the Censorship Cartel and Restore Free Speech_ **

_“The censorship cartel must be dismantled and destroyed... By restoring free speech, we will begin to reclaim our democracy, and save our nation.” - Donald J. Trump_

**ACTION PLAN TO SAVE FREE SPEECH: President Trump announced his plan to shatter the online censorship regime starting on the first day of his new administration.**
* On Day One, sign an EO to ban federal agencies from colluding with any entity to censor or categorize the lawful speech of American citizens

* Ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as “mis-” or “disinformation”

* Fire every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship activity

* Immediately send preservation letters to Biden administration and Big Tech giants

* Order the DOJ to investigate all parties involved in the online censorship regime and prosecute any and all crimes identified

* Revise Section 230 to drastically curtail big platforms’ power to arbitrarily restrict lawful speech

* Stop federal funding for all non-profits and academic programs that are part of the new censorship industry

* Suspend federal research dollars and student loan support to any university that has engaged in censorship support activities, such as flagging content for removal and blacklisting, for at least 5 years

* Enact clear criminal penalties for federal bureaucrats who partner with private entities to do an end-run around First Amendment and other Constitutional rights

* Impose a 7-year cooling-off period before employees of the FBI, CIA, NSA, DNI, DHS, or DOD can work at tech platforms possessing vast quantities of U.S. user data

* Pass a Digital Bill of Rights: force government to get a court order to request takedowns of online content, give users rights to know when their accounts are throttled or shadow-banned, a specific explanation of the reason, the right to a timely appeal, and for all users over 18, the right to opt-out of content moderation and curation and access an unmanipulated stream.

**BUSTING THE CENSORSHIP CARTEL: President Trump’s plan targets the collusion between Big Government, Big Tech, Big Media, and the Radical Left.**
* The plan follows recent bombshell reports confirming that federal bureaucrats, big tech giants, left-wing activists, and members of the corporate news media have been coordinating to censor Americans.

* Recently released communications revealed that Twitter conducted election interference and illicit censorship in direct collusion with the Biden campaign, the FBI, and other government agencies.

* Reports have also shown that the Department of Homeland Security partnered with left-wing nonprofits to censor 22 million social media posts ahead of the 2020 election.

* A lawsuit filed by the Attorneys General of Louisiana and Missouri has alleged that Dr. Anthony Fauci colluded with tech platforms to suppress information related to COVID-19.

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump December 16th, 2022 ICYMI: President Trump Unveiled His New Free Speech Policy Initiative Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump announced a new policy initiative aimed to dismantle the censorship cartel and restore free speech. Watch the video below: TRANSCRIPT: President Donald J. Trump — Free Speech Policy Initiative If we don’t have FREE SPEECH, then we just don’t have a FREE COUNTRY. It’s as simple as that. If this most fundamental right is allowed to perish, then the rest of our rights and liberties will topple just like dominos one by one. They’ll go down. That’s why today, I am announcing my plan to shatter the left-wing censorship regime, and to reclaim the right to Free Speech for all Americans. And reclaim is a very important word in this case because they’ve taken it away. In recent weeks, bombshell reports have confirmed that a sinister group of Deep State bureaucrats, Silicon Valley tyrants, left-wing activists, and depraved corporate news media have been conspiring to manipulate and silence the American People. They have collaborated to suppress vital information on everything from elections to public health. The censorship cartel must be dismantled and destroyed — and it must happen immediately. And here is my plan: FIRST, within hours of my inauguration, I will sign an executive order banning any federal department or agency from colluding with any organization, business, or person, to censor, limit, categorize, or impede the lawful speech of American citizens. I will then ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as “mis-” or “dis-information”. And I will begin the process of identifying and firing every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship—directly or indirectly—whether they are the Department of Homeland Security, the Department of Health and Human Services, the FBI, the DOJ, no matter who they are. SECOND, I will order the Department of Justice to investigate all parties involved in the new online censorship regime, which is absolutely destructive and terrible, and to aggressively prosecute any and all crimes identified. These include possible violations of federal civil rights law, campaign finance laws, federal election law, securities law, and anti-trust laws, the Hatch Act and a host of other potential criminal, civil, regulatory, and constitutional offenses. To assist in these efforts, I am urging House Republicans to immediately send preservation letters — and we have to do this right now — to the Biden administration, the Biden campaign, and every Silicon Valley tech giant, ordering them not to destroy evidence of censorship. THIRD, upon my inauguration as president, I will ask Congress to send a bill to my desk revising Section 230 to get big online platforms out of censorship business. From now on, digital platforms should only qualify for immunity protection under Section 230 if they meet high standards of neutrality, transparency, fairness, and non-discrimination. We should require these platforms to INCREASE their efforts to take down UNLAWFUL content, such as child exploitation and promoting terrorism, while dramatically curtailing their power to arbitrarily restrict lawful speech. FOURTH, we need to break up the entire toxic censorship industry that has arisen under the false guise of tackling so-called “mis-” and “dis-information.” The federal government should immediately stop funding all non-profits and academic programs that support this authoritarian project. If any U.S. university is discovered to have engaged in censorship activities or election interferences in the past—such as flagging social media content for removal [and] blacklisting—those universities should lose federal research dollars and federal student loan support for a period of five years, and maybe more. We should also enact new laws laying out clear criminal penalties for federal bureaucrats who partner with private entities to do an end-run around the Constitution and deprive Americans of their First, Fourth, and Fifth Amendment rights. In other words, deprive them of their vote. And once you lose those elections and once you lose your borders like we have, you no longer have a country. Furthermore, to confront the problems of major platforms being infiltrated by legions of former Deep Staters and intelligence officials, there should be a 7-year cooling-off period before any employee of the FBI, CIA, NSA, DNI, DHS, or DOD is allowed to take a job at a company possessing vast quantities of U.S. user data. FIFTH, the time has finally come for Congress to pass a digital Bill of Rights. This should include a right to digital due process—in other words, government officials should need a COURT ORDER to take down online content, not send information requests such as the FBI was sending to Twitter. Furthermore, when users of big online platforms have their content or accounts removed, throttled, shadow-banned, or otherwise restricted no matter what name they use, they should have the right to be informed that it’s happening, the right to a specific explanation of the reason why, and the right to a timely appeal. In addition, all users over the age of 18 should have the right to opt-out of content moderation and curation entirely, and receive an unmanipulated stream of information if they so choose. The fight for Free Speech is a matter of victory or death for America—and for the survival of Western Civilization itself. When I am President, this whole rotten system of censorship and information control will be ripped out of the system at large. There won’t be anything left. By restoring free speech, we will begin to reclaim our democracy, and save our nation. Thank you, and God Bless America. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump December 15th, 2022 ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Announces Plan to Restore Free Speech in America Today President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to restore free speech in America. In videotaped remarks, President Trump responds to the ongoing revelations of widespread censorship by outlining five steps to dismantle the censorship cartel. President Donald J. Trump's Plan to Dismantle the Censorship Cartel and Restore Free Speech “The censorship cartel must be dismantled and destroyed... By restoring free speech, we will begin to reclaim our democracy, and save our nation.” - Donald J. Trump ACTION PLAN TO SAVE FREE SPEECH: President Trump announced his plan to shatter the online censorship regime starting on the first day of his new administration. On Day One, sign an EO to ban federal agencies from colluding with any entity to censor or categorize the lawful speech of American citizens Ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as “mis-” or “disinformation” Fire every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship activity Immediately send preservation letters to Biden administration and Big Tech giants Order the DOJ to investigate all parties involved in the online censorship regime and prosecute any and all crimes identified Revise Section 230 to drastically curtail big platforms’ power to arbitrarily restrict lawful speech Stop federal funding for all non-profits and academic programs that are part of the new censorship industry Suspend federal research dollars and student loan support to any university that has engaged in censorship support activities, such as flagging content for removal and blacklisting, for at least 5 years Enact clear criminal penalties for federal bureaucrats who partner with private entities to do an end-run around First Amendment and other Constitutional rights Impose a 7-year cooling-off period before employees of the FBI, CIA, NSA, DNI, DHS, or DOD can work at tech platforms possessing vast quantities of U.S. user data Pass a Digital Bill of Rights: force government to get a court order to request takedowns of online content, give users rights to know when their accounts are throttled or shadow-banned, a specific explanation of the reason, the right to a timely appeal, and for all users over 18, the right to opt-out of content moderation and curation and access an unmanipulated stream. BUSTING THE CENSORSHIP CARTEL: President Trump’s plan targets the collusion between Big Government, Big Tech, Big Media, and the Radical Left. The plan follows recent bombshell reports confirming that federal bureaucrats, big tech giants, left-wing activists, and members of the corporate news media have been coordinating to censor Americans. Recently released communications revealed that Twitter conducted election interference and illicit censorship in direct collusion with the Biden campaign, the FBI, and other government agencies. Reports have also shown that the Department of Homeland Security partnered with left-wing nonprofits to censor 22 million social media posts ahead of the 2020 election. * A lawsuit filed by the Attorneys General of Louisiana and Missouri has alleged that Dr. Anthony Fauci colluded with tech platforms to suppress information related to COVID-19. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America PAC. donaldjtrump.com |

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. body:
Democrats’ economic plan is working, and we’re just getting started. Keep reading to see what else our party has been up to ahead of the holidays → | | |
---
President Biden has spent his presidency fighting to restore the backbone of this country -- _the middle class._ Now, as we head into the holiday season, folks are seeing gas prices that are at their lowest since Russia invaded Ukraine, inflation that has moderated, incomes that have increased, **and an economy that has grown at an even stronger pace than expected.**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhtcR_iZ_VWlstoxhOGBkHaHzLDuOgPfcM6rzauQnudKaAg2U6SsbzJC4I_M-g6Y-04Ve98bEakZnfs8EwaYH1F4Ce_aoQNrvl2ApOZ3hLDMpVNo8QPeyNH5QdVeeSipHDB12orQ0DzJVw-rrw99sxw9OsE0q30KlUFgSLiyhKKZxWDvCpf5iwFQNj0DShZnNW08v2LSBabAs0r13jT8T1FPDFXtB02aH0s9aSxwkeg-Z9SNgpFe6ki1R4HAMk43_7iA2zLR7UiZXZu0em8DMt4dXrCyznJLMlTZ7cH0VoVOuJS95oVpjI8OLFPSRKRTEgRbIfJjieOkhrxJD28Z5RNo/3s1/x2VIxQTgQf6qEhuxxd-aDg/h0/6dniqn7B_ACtMZgnKUSntG1LIbbYXS5j5a_-f7dt5aI)

**Bottom line: Democrats’ economic plan is working, and that’s good news for the American people. Keep reading to see what else our party has been up to ahead of the holidays →**

* * *
**CELEBRATING THE 75 YEAR ANNIVERSARY OF TOYS FOR TOTS**
This week, President Biden and Jill Biden celebrated the 75 year anniversary of Toys for Tots at an event hosted by the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhr_xp3_qH--u-pRIadJ8z5Rek49Rhwn8VZMPXdkhwVS0mBxMV2sLwqogJwxzjbGJ3wbWsjfxUmdFbiXJhZXeRhSRRuaxwdtI-lg2I7I9Jrv2fHMUXQaRqDb9JDYf5IVGP4ohT1GlbMoku6g_VpY1WY7WUgMulGeiQFtI0fk1KG52QMIgcm2x4yJdCYJfuEfZQClaHN8tDjjX9DbUXH0KVcW84wDaIXe2NqkyNhbcbuU_FG42zIozQHWkffcvmxoufh17qHVVk-ByijuLMTjszJVwXq9-gWU7f2cl6z32uTiNpEKXM3AA_7E4xFVjAhKZ12HMLAz3tmEUufh4t6I0T7o/3s1/x2VIxQTgQf6qEhuxxd-aDg/h2/nO4CqMKROJ4R3o7snribb45LM3iwJwm9povEVRlLlKc)

This engagement is part of Jill Biden’s Joining Forces initiative to support those who also serve: families of service members and veterans, caregivers, and survivors.

* * *
**_RESPECT FOR MARRIAGE ACT_ SIGNING**
On Tuesday, President Biden signed the historic _Respect for Marriage Act_ to enshrine marriage equality protections into federal law. This ceremony celebrated the courage of all those in previous generations to today who proudly lived their truth. Take a look:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAKy8CPWXmMSKb979xq4aFRMyIokDW9Y4EzhZwyVLh-yyA1MdGqwQAZ8xX9Xy5T5By7WbXy3u_Q2iFErcMK5C6sRzPe6zz2f93lQe5INy_fXA85Vi49O6LVWAn9upexOnMnSw_iUUUd0NXmv51PEQHGeZWJAIGK3sHB4UDLA38eEQ7wLudOZMqKpAdC8dDxrWW2t7VpoPyussDrXT0FujGzWE_mSdQEBOapJ-J0fz0jfmfDy92faiJpY2V8xLHXTlKM8KlHx0wavgFtH0lrhYrw-TL7ffeElW7yENzd5zO29dzQHvBRQq3p5sv1TdJj6FSIWcI2NGCq3kcGRD7Dtlh6tILz07e6Wb4RVbj61RmE3bFORuRXQwt3duLEuBHsrUTIaeX15OO0TDSpqMNgSFmDyWUHzWFzWFH6DFxmTdy4h0XbICwi6THXxb0EPKItCxlA/3s1/x2VIxQTgQf6qEhuxxd-aDg/h4/7u9mQWGA_-VZ1VqX0xcEC_mttDRPrhe94oVWMn_PbJ4)

For millions of Americans, this legislation will safeguard the rights and protections to which LGBTQI+ and interracial couples are entitled.

* * *
**HOLIDAY REMINDER: GET YOUR COVID VACCINE**
As you’re cooking your favorite family recipes and wrapping presents for your loved ones, be sure to add getting your updated COVID-19 vaccine to your holiday to-do list.
This updated vaccine offers the best protection for you and your family against the version of the virus we’re facing today and reduces the risk of catching or spreading the disease. In addition, the White House announced this week that free at-home, rapid COVID-19 tests will be available for a limited time.
**Visit[vaccines.gov](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/RWNSYu3wgygO9Q0srG2gFi0Cl2s4vjDJ6pTLKi6bNOBGFbGSUALv-VS052OZlWp0pJ5Y7-bS4ct0sWvw9-kJ79alzb2hcU3aSpxTduQ3undJOdsEkjykg6OU35pVEAyGvt0G4ybiEU0tnMXdKhRvC6xd8mt85LTG2UwyY5i4TE8rWs9Js34VTPsnHgqDelbSSvmhsAZaRjRf_GQjIeG3l8VzAqDMtMTM0mgZJQLVpTCqXBWdVUENExWdoOpbVnt1TUYyhIwTEY6oBLPvh94shA/3s1/x2VIxQTgQf6qEhuxxd-aDg/h6/uLmervwgTH1HD_zfT17Ztw1AJfrjAPWVl78qfDEw9Ls) today to find an appointment near you or visit [covidtests.gov](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/gXX4IWOWv8a8LHyxcrU5C9zts05lF28mnAJ8_C3Av7HxKmzytUVLXxx1RuM7b6Xo0sfep0N4kaWmaMJhNNtl_t7BQhQoPBhAZMNLcVViHT90Old31gybGysyg1kNwz6a1mDDUnUgV4B40mChGHQVXmW0MJXEYu7LOFkXB5Yy2DsHyEZIiqVpmleMq_8P3wKCju_WuT5RWNf2v8tn6-3fd8HBfiuhOkVAnZ2g4sAM7fODLLOL6bUxZkb0vLP2dAqHdl4My29ZrKtWO1LtespuVQ/3s1/x2VIxQTgQf6qEhuxxd-aDg/h7/gp6Rb4UiHW-IttS8LMYQ_IlIdUWCP6rAYwqueq3nSFs) to request your household’s rapid COVID-19 tests.**

clean_body: Democrats’ economic plan is working, and we’re just getting started. Keep reading to see what else our party has been up to ahead of the holidays → | | | President Biden has spent his presidency fighting to restore the backbone of this country -- the middle class. Now, as we head into the holiday season, folks are seeing gas prices that are at their lowest since Russia invaded Ukraine, inflation that has moderated, incomes that have increased, and an economy that has grown at an even stronger pace than expected. | | | Bottom line: Democrats’ economic plan is working, and that’s good news for the American people. Keep reading to see what else our party has been up to ahead of the holidays → CELEBRATING THE 75 YEAR ANNIVERSARY OF TOYS FOR TOTS This week, President Biden and Jill Biden celebrated the 75 year anniversary of Toys for Tots at an event hosted by the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve. This engagement is part of Jill Biden’s Joining Forces initiative to support those who also serve: families of service members and veterans, caregivers, and survivors. | | RESPECT FOR MARRIAGE ACT SIGNING On Tuesday, President Biden signed the historic Respect for Marriage Act to enshrine marriage equality protections into federal law. This ceremony celebrated the courage of all those in previous generations to today who proudly lived their truth. Take a look: For millions of Americans, this legislation will safeguard the rights and protections to which LGBTQI+ and interracial couples are entitled. | | HOLIDAY REMINDER: GET YOUR COVID VACCINE As you’re cooking your favorite family recipes and wrapping presents for your loved ones, be sure to add getting your updated COVID-19 vaccine to your holiday to-do list. This updated vaccine offers the best protection for you and your family against the version of the virus we’re facing today and reduces the risk of catching or spreading the disease. In addition, the White House announced this week that free at-home, rapid COVID-19 tests will be available for a limited time. Visit today to find an appointment near you or visit to request your household’s rapid COVID-19 tests. | | vaccines.gov?linkid=9&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-good-afternoon-from-team-joe&emailreferrer=email1767702&emailsubject=open-for-this-weeks-team-joe-newsletter | | covidtests.gov?linkid=10&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-good-afternoon-from-team-joe&emailreferrer=email1767702&emailsubject=open-for-this-weeks-team-joe-newsletter IN STOCK 👀 Peter -- check out this Donkey Cookie Cutter we have in stock! Whether you’re baking with friends and family or enjoying a holiday treat, this cookie cutter is perfect for all -- and you’ll be showing off your Democratic pride with every bite! A HUMBLE REQUEST As this monumental year comes to a close, our party is relying on the support of this grassroots team to continue building the strong infrastructure Democratic candidates will need to run and win in 2023 and beyond. With your help, we were able to protect our Senate majority, elect new Democratic governors, and flip state legislatures across the country -- but there’s still work to be done year-round. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Happy holidays, Team Joe | |

TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1c2ee189a1d54654a6d24ca230012774&_e=wQHvXF-3Qa7_lpDrGUMVD8cOXfCB3hCPM4pO1ROekwEPa3NJkAnNbNrTYBI67FyuY9TZjh51pqneSHakrwHrx1FEZqctQLiD7gtFyXyO7WkKjo-MBI_UKzldwXv3zN7fQwzcuaMh_9fXmMmqzoz5DGvz36r2pgwJVp65YY24JINsaUjKe7EuIv3Ctx1lQonR6OC6VyABXAx4JilyJLLei_nDWUb7JAuJsP4BsGpeQ_KJhSiR4a6sTFdgoScXW2VPySQqo9Sg_PCH9226tvusJpy-ArMNBf-LN72vVxx6iGMOXpv61EPgq7dMkxKOtKoj8422CmCQW12x6VQJ2rO5AQ%3D%3D)
